title: AI Video Creator — Daily Short-Form Content
description:
We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented AI video creator to produce short-form vertical videos daily for a hair and cooking brands. This is a long-term, execution-focused role. You will be given scripts, references, and clear direction — your job is to produce clean, consistent output every single day.



This is not a strategy role. This is not freelance project work. This is daily production with a repeatable workflow.



What You'll Do

- Generate AI video clips using Google Veo 3 and/or HeyGen, also Grok

- Edit clips into short-form videos (TikTok, Reels, Shorts format) using CapCut

- Follow provided scripts and match the intended brand style exactly

- Add captions, cuts, pacing, and basic effects as needed

- Deliver finished videos daily, ready to post

- Communicate progress, questions, and blockers daily over 



**Requirements**



- Access to and working experience with Google Veo 3 or HeyGen (at least one is required)

- Proficiency in CapCut, Access to ChatGPT/Claude

- Strong English comprehension — you will be working from English scripts

- Reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace

- Ability to follow instructions precisely and consistently

- Available to communicate daily over 

- Fast turnaround and high attention to detail

- No other full-time clients — this role requires your daily commitment



**Nice to Have**



- Experience creating AI avatar or talking head content

- Familiarity with short-form content pacing and hooks

- Experience with ElevenLabs or other AI voice tools

---



**Pay**



$300/month — consistent, stable, paid monthly. First month is testing period. If satisfactory, we will rehire for additional months.



How to Apply



Include the following — incomplete applications will not be reviewed:



1. A short paragraph (3–5 sentences) about your experience creating short-form video content

2. Links to sample videos you have created or edited (YouTube, TikTok, Google Drive, or similar)

3. Your daily availability and timezone

3. Which AI video tools you currently have access to and your experience level with each

5. Confirm if you need AI tools, if you are renewing your own tools.

title: Instagram Content & Growth Manager for Ecommerce Brand
description:
We are looking for a part-time Instagram Content & Growth Manager for Meiyodeck, a premium trading card accessories brand selling mainly on Amazon.



The role is focused on managing our Instagram business account, creating high-quality product content, growing engagement, and helping guide customers from Instagram to our Amazon store.



Responsibilities:

- Create Instagram posts, reels, stories, and carousels

- Use real product images or accurate product-based visuals

- Write captions, hooks, and hashtags

- Build a simple content calendar

- Create engagement-focused content for collectors

- Suggest content ideas based on trends and competitors

- Track basic performance and improve based on results



Requirements:

- Experience managing Instagram business accounts

- Strong visual taste

- Good English writing

- Experience with product or ecommerce content

- Canva and/or CapCut experience

- Reliable, proactive, and able to work independently



Nice to have:

Experience with Amazon brands, collectibles, Pokémon, sports cards, TCG, UGC content, ChatGPT, AI image tools, or Instagram analytics.



Important:

AI tools are allowed, but the product must look realistic and match the actual Meiyodeck product. No fake-looking product images, fake followers, spammy captions, misleading claims, or risky growth tactics.



This is a part-time freelance role to start. Budget is $200–$600/month depending on experience and quality. During the first 30 days, all posts and captions must be approved before publishing.



To apply, please include:

1. Examples of Instagram accounts or content you have managed

2. Your experience with ecommerce or product content

3. Tools you use

4. Your expected monthly rate

5. One short idea for growing a premium trading card accessories brand on Instagram

title: Full-Time Video Editor for 7 Figures Supplement Brand
description:
About Us

We’re a fast-growing DTC brand in the health supplement space, scaling to 30K days with performance-driven creatives. Every ad we launch is backed by data and crafted to convert. We’re looking for a video editor who not only edits but also thinks like a marketer - someone who wants to grow, push limits, and create winning ads at scale.



The Role

We’re hiring a Video Editor who can consistently deliver high-performing Meta video ads (30–120s). This is a long-term, remote role with $4 start salary which increase if hit rate is on target. Also introducing performance bonuses in 2nd month.



What You’ll Do

- Edit high-converting ads for Meta & Google (30–120s)

- Apply strong hooks, pacing, captions, and transitions

- Work with UGC, b-roll, and AI-generated content (Heygen, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana and VEO3)

- Test UGC-style videos, TikTok-style ads, AI visuals, and VSLs

- Analyze performance data & iterate quickly based on KPIs (hook rate, hold rate, CVR)

- Collaborate closely with the Creative Manager + other editors to push volume

- Source raw footage & voiceovers to bring concepts to life

- Experiment with new formats, trends, and storytelling angles



You Need

- Experience editing performance-driven Meta ads (UGC/direct response)

- Proven portfolio of short-form, direct response ads

- Strong creative eye and ability to deliver 15 ad concepts per week

- Understanding of marketing psychology, hooks, and consumer behavior

- Hunger to grow — willing to test, fail, and iterate fast



What You’ll Get

- Base salary: $4 per hour (start salary that increases if performance is on target) + performance bonuses

- Fully remote role

- Direct collaboration with a high-performing editors, strategists and Founder

- Managed under a dedicated Creative Manager who oversees editors and strategy



How to Apply

Send us a link to your portfolio or past performance ads

title: Turn Up the Heat: E-Commerce & Digital Marketing Rockstar Needed to Launch a Premium Hot Sauce Brand from Scratch! (Full
description:
urn Up the Heat: E-Commerce & Digital Marketing Rockstar Needed to Launch a Premium Hot Sauce Brand from Scratch!

(Full-Time Remote – Philippines)

We’re a proven hot sauce company already crushing it with wholesale sales to restaurants and distributors across the US. Now we’re launching an entirely new direct-to-consumer retail brand — premium, mouth-watering hot sauces sold straight to homes and individual customers nationwide.

This is a true ground-up build. Everything starts from zero, and we’re looking for one talented, high-energy person in the Philippines to own it and drive it to success. If you love building, creating viral content, and getting paid when the sales roll in, this is your chance to be the key player who makes it happen.

What You’ll Actually Do (This is NOT a boring desk job)



Build and launch our full Shopify store from the ground up (theme design, product pages, checkout, payments — the works)

Set up and optimize sales channels including Shopify + Amazon

Create and run high-converting TikTok ads (you’ll shoot, edit, and optimize the videos yourself — this is where the fun and virality happens)

Manage and scale
 & Instagram ads in Meta Ads Manager

Combine killer creative + smart ad strategy to drive traffic, conversions, and real revenue

Handle light CRM tasks in Zoho (not the main focus)

Work directly with the US founder every step of the way in a fast-moving startup environment



Your work will directly impact how many bottles we sell and how fast this new brand grows. Every win is yours to celebrate.

What We’re Looking For (Must-Have Proof)



You’ve already built and launched Shopify stores (we need to see your portfolio)

You’ve created and run successful TikTok ad campaigns yourself (include sample videos + results)

You have solid, proven experience with
 & Instagram ads

You understand Amazon selling or similar marketplaces

You’re comfortable wearing multiple hats — website building, video creation, ads, and sales strategy all in one role

Self-motivated, love challenges, and can work independently

Excellent English communication (written and spoken)

You can work US business hours (Central Time — this means evening/night shifts in the Philippines)



Compensation & Why This Pays Better Than Most Remote Roles



Competitive base salary: $800 – $2,000 USD per month (paid monthly, depending on your experience and proven track record)

Generous, uncapped sales commission — the more the store and ads perform, the more you earn. Real upside as we scale!

Opportunity to grow with the company (this is a brand-new retail company — early tea
mbers move up fast)



This is a real shot at building something exciting and earning a strong base + performance pay that rewards results. Top performers in this role regularly clear well above the base.

How to Apply (We Move Fast!)

Upload your résumé and portfolio directly here.

Please include direct links to:



Shopify stores you have built and launched

TikTok ad campaigns you created, shot, edited, and ran (with sample videos)

/Instagram ad results you’re proud of (screenshots or links showing performance)



Only applicants with clear, proven experience in Shopify + TikTok/Facebook ads will be considered. No exceptions.

If you’re ready to spice things up, build something real, and get paid as we grow, hit apply now. We’re excited to meet you!

Let’s make this new hot sauce brand the next big thing. ????

title: Funnelish Funnel Builder for Long-Term E-Commerce Role (Health & Wellness)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company selling health and wellness products across Europe. We're looking for a sharp, detail-obsessed funnel builder with experience in Funnelish to join us long-term.

This is not a short gig — we're building a team for the long haul. The starting pay reflects the trial period only. After that, you can expect:



Regular pay raises based on performance and contribution

Paid holidays and vacation days

Performance-based bonuses

Real growth opportunities as the company scales — the people who prove themselves early grow with us



We invest in our team, and we expect commitment in return.

WE NEED SOMEONE WHO IS:



Hardworking, smart, dedicated, and a perfectionist

Able to work with MINIMAL supervision

Detail-obsessed (a misplaced comma in a price like "€24,95" is a mistake we notice immediately)

Fast learner who can follow a template and SOP precisely

Reliable internet connection (50+ Mbps) with a backup option

Able to overlap at least 4 hours with European business hours (CET/CEST)



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:



Building advertorials,  product pages, checkouts and full funnels in Funnelish



Following our existing template and SOP exactly



Implementing copy in multiple European languages (Dutch, German, French, Spanish, Swedish, etc.) — you don't need to speak any of them, but you need to copy-paste accurately and respect language-specific formatting (e.g. "€24,95" with comma for NL/DE, "29,95kr" for SE, "29,95€" for DE)



Working independently with AI tools to produce images, videos, and copy — you should be comfortable with tools like ChatGPT, Gemini, Canva, ElevenLabs, VEED, etc., and able to generate creative assets without us holding your hand



Adding GIFs, product images, FB-style comment blocks, scoring cards, review sections



Setting up Shopify product pages with correct SKU structure



Installing tracking (we use wetracked) and creating automations



Mobile-first QA — every funnel must look perfect on mobile before going live



SKILL REQUIREMENTS:



Funnelish



Shopify (basic product setup, variants, SKUs)



Web design & page layout (clean, minimal, conversion-focused)



Confident using AI tools to create product photos, videos, and write/refine copy independently



English: B2 or higher (clear written communication is essential)



BONUS SKILLS (not required, but a big plus):



Experience with health/wellness or supplement dropshipping



Familiarity with Meta Ads compliance (knowing what claims trigger ad rejections)



Basic Canva or Photoshop for quick image edits



Experience working with multi-language European stores



HOW TO APPLY:

To filter out generic applications, please reply with:



Your full name and timezone

3 funnels you've built — links to live URLs (not screenshots, not "I built for a client and can't share"). Any language is fine.

Which page builders you've used and how many funnels you've built in each

Your fastest internet speed test result (screenshot from 
 or speedtest.net)

The answer to this question: What is the biggest mistake you see beginner funnel builders make?

Start your message with the word "PERFECTIONIST" so we know you read this entire post



Applications without all 6 items will be ignored. We're looking to hire within 1 week.

title: Aesthetic Social Media Manager – Plastic Surgery (Before/After + Paid Ads + High-End Branding)
description:
We are a Beverly Hills plastic surgery practice seeking a high-level Social Media Manager with experience in aesthetic medicine, before/after organization, and paid marketing (PPC). This role includes content creation, before/after photo management, and paid advertising. This is NOT a basic posting job. We are looking for someone who understands luxury branding and patient conversion.



Responsibilities: Create and manage Instagram, TikTok, and
 content. Produce high-end reels and posts that attract real patients. Maintain a clean, luxury aesthetic appropriate for a Beverly Hills plastic surgery practice. Organize before and after photos systematically. Ensure proper lighting consistency, cropping, alignment, labeling, and categorization. Distribute before and after content across Instagram, TikTok,
, RealSelf, and provide to our website management team. Manage and run paid advertising campaigns on Instagram,
, and Google Ads for medspa and aesthetic services. Optimize campaigns for leads and conversions, not just clicks. Track and report performance.



Requirements: Please include a list of your previous employment, including dates of employment, exact duties and responsibilities, company name, and your supervisor’s name and company contact information.



Experience with plastic surgery or medspa marketing. Strong understanding of before and after presentation. Experience running paid ads on Meta (Instagram/Facebook) and Google. Skilled in tools such as CapCut, Adobe, Photoshop or equivalent. Not Canva-only.



Do not apply if: You only use Canva templates. You have no before and after experience. You have never run paid ads. You cannot show real accounts you personally managed.



Required test: Create one Instagram post for a Beverly Hills plastic surgeon. 1) Before and after post using any sample images, must look real, clean, and high-end. 2) Write a professional caption including a call to action. 3) Provide one reel idea that would attract patients.



Required submission format: 1) Three Instagram accounts you personally managed. 2) One example of organized before and after work (folder system or samples). 3) One paid ad campaign you ran (results or screenshots preferred). 4) The test assignment. 5) List of tools you use.

title: AI Video Production VA
description:
We Are Hiring!

AI Video Production Assistant

Full-Time | Serious Applicants Only



We operate a growing network of YouTube channels and publish content daily across multiple niches. To keep up with demand, we're adding a dedicated production assistant to our team — someone who wants to stick around, master a workflow, and build something long-term with us.



You won't be creating content from scratch. You'll be following a clear, repeatable process — handling scripting, video production, and publishing using a set of AI tools we'll train you on from day one. It takes time to learn. It takes discipline to execute daily. But for the right person, it's a stable, rewarding role with real room to grow.



This is not for people looking for a side gig or a quick paycheck. This is for someone ready to dedicate themselves fully.



What We Need

• Full-time availability — 8 hours a day

• Patience and commitment during the learning phase

• Obsessive attention to detail

• Ability to work independently and stay on track without supervision

• Comfortable picking up new AI tools quickly

• Stable internet connection, always reachable during work hours

• Solid written English skills

• Long-term only — we invest in people who invest in us



Bonus Points

• Familiarity with YouTube or content workflows

• Hands-on experience with AI tools

• Background in VA or operations work



Compensation

Base: $300 USD/month + performance bonuses

2-month review with potential pay increase

All tools provided and paid for — nothing comes out of your pocket



To Apply

Send a DM starting with the word 'COMMITTED' (so we know you read everything). Include: a quick intro and your location, your hours and timezone, any relevant experience, and what makes you the right fit for a demanding, long-term role.



Only apply if this is your primary focus. We're building a team — not a roster of side hustlers.

title: High-Volume Recruiter- Construction, Engineering, Mining  Sectors
description:
Role: High-Volume Recruitment Specialist- for Construction, Engineering,  Heavy Industry, Mining /Oil and Gas roles. 

Location: 100% Remote - WFH

Hours: 40 hrs per week. - 9am - 5pm AEST> 

Region: Perth, WA - Australia 

Monthly Salary: 55 - 60k PHP + Generous Bonus + Perks + Paid Leave

Contract: Independent Contractor - Ongoing



Our Client

Our Client is a specialist recruitment and workforce solutions provider, supporting clients across heavy industry sectors including construction, engineering, mining, and oil & gas. With a strong reputation for delivering quality talent at scale, supporting critical projects, shutdowns, and ongoing workforce needs.





The Role

We are seeking an experienced Talent Acquisition Specialist to join our team, focused on delivering high-volume recruitment across multiple heavy industry sectors. This role will play a key part in sourcing, mobilising, and managing large workforces for major projects, including FIFO assignments and shutdown campaigns.



This is a fast-paced, delivery-focused position suited to someone agile who thrives in high-volume environments and understands the complexities of workforce mobilisation.



Key Responsibilities. 



- Manage end-to-end recruitment across high-volume roles within construction, engineering, mining, and oil & gas

- Deliver bulk hiring campaigns for project-based and shutdown requirements

- Source and engage candidates through multiple channels, including job boards, databases, referrals, and direct outreach

- Screen and assess candidates efficiently while maintaining quality standards

- Coordinate workforce mobilisation, including compliance, documentation, and onboarding requirements. 

- Build and manage a pipeline of compliant and "site ready" candidates. 

- Manage FIFO recruitment processes, including logistics and candidate readiness

- Partner with internal stakeholders to understand workforce needs and timelines

- Maintain accurate candidate records and reporting within ATS/CRM systems. Bullhorn. 

- Ensure a strong candidate experience throughout the recruitment lifecycle

- Support workforce planning and pipeline development for upcoming projects



Requirements To Apply. 

- 3+ years proven experience in high volume recruitment, in heavy industry sectors (construction/engineering/mining/oil and gas). 

- 2 + years previous experience with International Recruitment (Clients and Candidates outside of PH). 

- Excellent communication skills in English both written and verbal. 

- High degree of confidence talking to candidates via phone. 

- Experience using recruitment tools ATS/CRM systems such as Bullhorn or similar. 



Ideal Candidates. 

- Have previous experience with an Australian recruitment and workforce solutions company. 

- Strong understanding of construction, engineering, mining, and/or oil & gas recruitment

- Experience recruiting for FIFO roles and managing workforce mobilisation

- Demonstrated experience supporting shutdowns or project-based hiring campaigns

- Ability to manage multiple roles and tight deadlines in a fast-paced environment

- Strong stakeholder management and communication skills

- Highly organised with strong attention to detail



Why Apply?

Opportunity to work with a well-established and growing recruitment business. 

Long-term stable role. 

Exposure to major projects across key industry sectors.

Collaborative and supportive team environment.

Competitive salary and performance incentives.

Career growth within a specialist recruitment environment.



How to Apply. 

- Please link your most updated CV. 

- Please provide a brief overview of your most relevant experience for the client and role. 

- Please highlight Australian experience. 

- Provide an overview of your complete WFH Set-Up including device/internet speed test/ back-up internet options and back-up power options. 

- Please provide a brief intro video- 3 minutes Max.

title: Female Appointment Setter (Multiple Clients)

We provide paid training to help you succeed in this role. Pay adjustments may be considered after training based on performance and company needs.

Interested applicants may apply through this link:

title: Appointment Setter / Cold Caller – Agricultural Services (Part-Time)
description:
We are looking for a reliable, professional cold caller with excellent English skills to help us book appointments with farm owners on the East Coast.

About the Role

You will make outbound calls to farm owners who use the H-2A program. Your goal is to introduce our H-2A paperwork and recruitment compliance services and set 15-minute discovery calls for the owner.

Agent Duties:

•  Make 40–60 outbound cold calls per day

•  Follow the provided script and objection handlers

•  Qualify leads and book appointments

•  Leave professional voi
s

•  Log all calls and outcomes in Google Sheets

•  All calls are recorded for quality and training

Schedule:

•  Part-time and flexible (on and off – not full-time every week)

•  Monday to Thursday only (No Fridays, weekends, or holidays)

•  Core hours: 8:00 AM – 1:00 PM Eastern Time (US)

•  Some days may start at 7:30 AM or go until 2:00 PM depending on the week

Requirements (Must Have):

•  Excellent, near-perfect English — very clear pronunciation, neutral or light accent, and a professional phone voice

•  Previous cold calling or appointment setting experience is a big plus

•  Comfortable speaking with business owners

•  Quiet workspace with good internet and headset

•  Reliable, self-motivated, and punctual

What We Provide:

•  Full call script + objection handling guide

•  Targeted lead list (East Coast farms)

•  Cloud phone system with US numbers + automatic call recording

•  Training and regular feedback

•  Google Sheet for tracking

Pay:

$5.00 – $7.50 per hour depending on experience and performance.

We are fair and will increase pay after 2–4 weeks for strong performers (based on appointments set).

title: Amazon Growth Operator for Amazon FBA Brand
description:
We are hiring an Amazon Growth Operator for our Amazon FBA brand.



This is not a basic PPC role.



You will help manage Amazon PPC, organic keyword ranking, product launches, product relaunches, conversion rate, TACOS, keyword tracking, and coordination with our creator/inbox VA.



We need someone who understands that PPC is not just about lowering ACOS. PPC should help drive profitable growth, improve organic ranking, and support the overall product strategy.



You will be responsible for:



Managing Sponsored Products campaigns.

Tracking organic keyword rankings.

Choosing which keywords should be pushed for ranking.

Monitoring CTR, CVR, CPC, ACOS, TACOS, sessions, and unit session percentage.

Creating weekly action plans for each product.

Identifying when a product has a traffic problem, conversion problem, or ranking problem.

Coordinating with our creator/inbox VA so they know which products and keywords need support.

Helping execute launch and relaunch plans.

Search term harvesting and negative keyword management.

Flagging listing issues that hurt conversion, including price, reviews, main image, coupon, title, images, and A+ content.



Requirements:



Experience with Amazon Seller Central.

Experience with Amazon Campaign Manager.

Experience with Helium 10 or similar keyword tools.

Strong spreadsheet skills.

Good English.

Strong analytical thinking.

Ability to manage tasks and communicate clearly with another VA.

Ability to follow SOPs and improve them over time.



To apply, please answer:





If we want to rank for 1 keyword, how would you set up the Sponsored Products campaign?



How would you d
 which keyword deserves external support?



Have you ever managed or coordinated with another VA? Give an example.



Please send C.V!!



Experience with Amazon Seller Central, Campaign Manager, Helium 10, keyword research, and PPC reports is required.

title: Executive Assistant to UK Company Ceo
description:
Important – Read Before Applying



Serious applicants only.



A minimum of 25 application points is required to be considered for this role.



Please do not apply if you do not meet this requirement.



Applications that do not meet the minimum criteria will be automatically rejected.



We are only looking for candidates who meet the experience and performance standards outlined in this role.





-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





Full-Time | Remote

Monday to Friday, 9:00am – 5:00pm (UK Time)



We are a finance management firm based in Europe

Role Description:



This is a full-time remote role for an Executive Assistant (Operations & Sales Support).



The Executive Assistant will act as the right hand to the Director, responsible for managing daily operations, supporting sales activity, and ensuring the business runs efficiently.



Responsibilities include managing schedules, handling communication, tracking tasks and performance, supporting CRM updates, and ensuring all operational processes are followed.



This is not a basic administrative role — this position requires someone who can take ownership, manage priorities, and ensure execution across the business.



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Qualifications



• Minimum 4+ years consistent experience (2023–2026) in an Executive Assistant or operations-focused role

• Strong experience in Executive Administrative Assistance and high-level business support

• Proven ability to manage diaries, schedules, meetings, and executive priorities

• Experience supporting operations, sales processes, or workflow coordination

• Strong understanding of CRM systems, pipelines, and task tracking

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• High attention to detail and organisational ability

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple responsibilities

• Proficiency in Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, and CRM tools

• Relevant degree or business-related qualification preferred



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Key Responsibilities



• Manage the Director’s daily schedule and priorities

• Handle all business
s and communications

• Track tasks, follow-ups, and ensure completion

• Monitor CRM and maintain accurate data

• Support sales processes and lead follow-up

• Coordinate internal communication and team activity

• Track KPIs, targets, and performance

• Ensure operations run smoothly across the business



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Working Hours



Full-Time

Monday to Friday

9:00am – 5:00pm (UK Time)



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Important Requirements



• You must have recent, consistent Executive Assistant experience (2023–2026)

• This role requires someone who can manage operations, not just admin tasks

• You must be comfortable handling
s, calls, CRM, and task tracking

• You must be fully available during working hours



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Application Conditions



• Do not apply if you currently have another full-time job

• This role requires full attention during working hours

• We are only considering candidates with real, verifiable experience

• References will be checked



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



What We Are Looking For



We are looking for a high-level Executive Assistant who can operate as the right hand to the Director.



You must:



• Take ownership of tasks without supervision

• Keep operations organised and moving

• Manage pressure and multiple priorities

• Maintain professionalism and confidentiality at all times



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Application Requirements

SUBJECTLINE : EA-CCEO

To be considered, you must include:

1. Companies worked for in 2023, 2024, 2025, and 2026 and your role within the company

2. Your current role and daily responsibilities as of today

3. Your experience supporting executives and managing operations

4. Tools and systems you have used (CRM, scheduling tools, etc.)

5. Your WhatsApp contact number



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Events Administrator/Lead generation
description:
Hours: 38 hours/week (full-time)



Rate: $200/week (~$5.26/hour), with pay review after 3 months for strong performers



Schedule: Monday–Friday, 1pm–8pm Manila time. Planning calls Monday & Friday.



Bonuses: 13th month pay (paid in December, pro-rated for time worked)



Start: Two-week paid trial, then ongoing if it's a good fit



About us

The Design Forums connects architects & interior designers across the UK and Ireland through a portfolio of industry events including The Architects Forums, The Design Forums and Design Soiree. We organise RIBA-accredited CPD seminars, product showcases and networking events in over 12 cities. We're looking for a full-time VA to support our growing events calendar with LinkedIn outreach, event logistics and invoice management.



Our Websites: 









The role



LinkedIn outreach — Sending connection requests and follow-up messages to a defined list of target prospects using approved templates. You'll work from our LinkedIn account via a shared browser setup. Must understand LinkedIn's weekly limits and how to keep an account in good standing.

Event logistics coordination — Supporting the planning and delivery of events including liaising with attendees, collecting requirements (dietary needs, accessibility, timings), chasing confirmations, and keeping our CRM up to date.

Invoice chasing — Polite, professional follow-ups with clients on overdue invoices. You'll work from a weekly aged debtors report we provide.





Working pattern



38 hours per week, Monday to Friday



Core hours: 1pm–8pm Manila time (= 6am–1pm Dublin during Irish summer; 5am–12pm Dublin during Irish winter)



Planning calls every Monday and Friday at 5pm Manila / 10am Dublin — Monday to plan the week ahead, Friday to review

Additional check-in calls as and when required throughout the week

Short daily update
 (3 bullet points: what I did today / what I'm doing tomorrow / anything blocking me)

Most of your day is async — you'll work through the task list independently between calls





Tools & systems



You'll use our VOIP phone system for all outbound calls (we provide access)

You'll use our CRM for logging activity, tracking contacts, and managing follow-ups

Training will be provided on both systems, but the expectation is that you can hit the ground running — you should be comfortable learning new software quickly and working independently from day one





Equipment & setup required



Dedicated home office or quiet workspace (no background noise on calls)

Professional headset with clear microphone

Stable, reliable internet connection 

Backup internet option (mobile hotspot) in case of outages

Working computer with webcam for video calls





Who we're looking for



2+ years' VA experience, ideally with a Western client

Strong written and spoken English — your messages and calls represent our business

Confident on outbound calls — friendly, professional, not timid

Detail-oriented; events work means small mistakes have real consequences

Self-starter who can manage their own workload without constant supervision



Bonus if you have:



Experience in events, hospitality, or B2B sales support

Experience with 
, or another CRM





Pay & progression



$200/week during the two-week paid trial

Continued at $200/week after a successful trial

Pay review at 3 months with a rise for excellent performance



13th month bonus paid in December (pro-rated for time worked) — yours from your first month

Paid via Wise or PayPal, weekly or fortnightly





To apply, please send a WhatsApp message to 
mentioning my name (Mike) and the company (The Design Forums), along with:



A short intro (text or 1-min voice note/video — voice or video preferred)



Applications  that don't mention my name and the company, won't be reviewed — it's how I filter for people who actually read job posts.



If your reply looks like a good fit, the next step will be a short video interview. We arte hoping for an immediete start.



Looking forward to hearing from you.



Mike

The Design Forums

? Competitive base pay

If you consistently create winning ads, you will be trained to become a media buyer.

Top performers don’t stay editors.

What you would improve

title: Client Accounting Manager
description:
Client Accounting Manager



***To apply you must read the entire post and follow the directions at the bottom***



Location: Remote

Type: Full-time (40 hours/week, 6am–2pm CST)

Reports To: CEO



About Us

Out of Site Bookkeeping is a fast-growing, client-focused bookkeeping firm dedicated to helping small businesses succeed. We pride ourselves on our collaborative, supportive culture and our commitment to continuous improvement. Join a team where your expertise and leadership will be valued!



Position Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Client Accounting Manager to provide high level client support and project management, as well as train and manage our bookkeeping team. The ideal candidate is a natural leader with exceptional communication skills, a continuous improvement mindset, and a passion for delivering outstanding client experiences. You’ll thrive under deadlines, support your team, and ensure the highest standards of service for our clients.



Key Responsibilities

1. Team Training & Development:

   Mentor, train, and support the bookkeeping team to foster skill development, accountability, and a collaborative culture. Provide regular feedback and training to help team members reach their full potential and keep up on new bookkeeping best practices.

2. Quality Control & Process Optimization:

   Oversee the accuracy and compliance of all client bookkeeping work. Conduct regular quality checks, update and maintain SOPs and best practices, and lead process improvements to enhance efficiency and minimize errors.

3. Client Project Management:

   Guide client projects from onboarding to completion by outlining project tasks and milestones for the team to fulfill. Assist bookkeepers with high level entries (and provide training) to keep projects on track. Follow up with clients to obtain documents or other information necessary to keep on track. 



Qualifications

- Degree in accounting or a related field

- Strong knowledge of accounting principles and practices

- Excellent attention to detail, analytical, and problem-solving skills

- Excellent verbal and written English; must be easily understood by US-based clients

- Strong teamwork and independent work abilities

- Proficiency with Microsoft Office Suite and Google GSuite, especially Excel/Sheets

- Flexible and adaptable to changing guidelines and bookkeeping practices



Experience

- Minimum 5 years of bookkeeping experience

- At least 2 years of leadership or management experience

- Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience with QuickBooks Online



Compensation & Benefits

- Training pay: $5/hr for the first ~90 days, pay rate increase based on performance during training

- 13th month pay or holiday bonuses

- Professional growth and development opportunities

- Collaborative, supportive team environment



How to Apply:

1. Reply to this job post with “World’s Best Leader” in the subject line.

2. In your response, state how many:

- years of leadership or supervisory experience you have

- years of bookkeeping experience you have

- years of hands-on experience with QuickBooks Online you have

3. Tell us one thing that sets you apart from other applicants.



***Applications that do NOT follow these instructions will be automatically disqualified without opening.



Ready to lead, inspire, and make a difference? We’d love to hear from you!

title: Accounting Manager
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a Senior Accounting Manager to lead and orchestrate the financial operations of a large-scale, global enterprise. This is not a "hands-on" role for a generalist; it is a strategic leadership position requiring a candidate who has mastered the complexities of high-volume transactions and multi-national entity management.



The successful candidate will oversee a sophisticated accounting department, providing high-level coordination across specialized functions including AP, AR, Cost Accounting, and FP&A. You will be responsible for the integrity of the group’s financial health, specifically focusing on the consolidation of multiple overseas sub-entities and ensuring seamless financial reporting at scale.



Key Responsibilities

1. Strategic Leadership & Team Management

-Directly manage and mentor a team of functional managers (AP Manager, AR Manager, Cost Manager, and FP&A Manager).

-Standardize accounting workflows across departments to ensure maximum efficiency and accuracy.

-Act as the primary bridge between technical accounting and strategic financial planning.



2. Global Consolidation & Reporting

-Lead the month-end and year-end closing process for the parent company and 3+ international sub-entities.

-Prepare and review Consolidated Financial Statements in accordance with IFRS/GAAP, ensuring all intercompany eliminations and foreign currency translations are flawlessly executed.

-Oversee global audit coordination and ensure compliance with international statutory requirements.



3. Operational Excellence & Oversight

-Supervise the Cost Management function to ensure manufacturing/operational costs are optimized and accurately reflected.

-Collaborate with the FP&A Manager to align historical accounting data with forward-looking budgets and forecasts.

-Ensure the AR and AP functions are operating at scale, maintaining healthy cash flow and vendor/client relationships.



4. Systems & Internal Controls

-Maintain and improve internal control frameworks (SOX or equivalent) within a large-scale ERP environment (SAP, Oracle, etc.).

-Drive continuous process improvement to handle increasing transaction volumes and organizational complexity.



Qualifications & Requirements

-Experience: Minimum of 10+ years of progressive accounting experience, with at least 3 years in a Senior Management role within a large corporate environment or a Big 4 accounting firm.



-Scale Mastery: Proven track record of managing accounting for organizations with significant revenue and complex departmental structures. Experience in small-to-mid-sized firms alone will not be sufficient for this role.



-Technical Expertise: Expert-level knowledge of Consolidated Financial Statements and multi-currency reporting.



-Education: Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance; CPA or CMA certification is highly preferred.



-Systems: Advanced proficiency in Tier-1 ERP systems (SAP S/4HANA, Oracle EBS) and consolidation software.



-Leadership: Demonstrated ability to manage other managers and influence stakeholders at the executive level.

title: Virtual Finance Manager (Property Management) UK
description:
Job Title: Accounts & KPI Manager (Property Management)

Job Overview



We are a UK-based property management and lettings company looking for a highly organised and detail-driven Accounts & KPI Manager to take full ownership of our financial processes.



This role is not just bookkeeping — you will be responsible for ensuring all financial data is accurate, reconciled across multiple systems, and that the business has clear visibility on performance through KPI reporting.



Key Responsibilities

Full reconciliation of accounts across Xero and our internal property management CRM

Ensuring all income and expenditure is correctly recorded, allocated, and matched across systems

Identifying and resolving discrepancies quickly and efficiently

Chasing internal team members for missing information, invoices, or supporting documents

Making sure all costs are correctly allocated and cross-charged to the correct properties, landlords, or projects

Monitoring rent payments, contractor invoices, and management fees

Producing regular financial reports and KPI dashboards for management

Highlighting issues, trends, or inefficiencies within the business

Assisting in improving internal financial processes and accountability

Key Skills & Experience

Strong experience using Xero (essential)

Proven experience in account reconciliation across multiple systems

High level of attention to detail — accuracy is critical in this role

Confident in chasing teams and holding people accountable for missing information

Strong understanding of financial reporting and KPIs

Experience in property management or real estate (preferred but not essential)

Excellent organisational and communication skills

Ability to work independently and take ownership of tasks

What We’re Looking For

Someone who takes full ownership of the accounts function

A problem-solver who can identify and fix issues, not just report them

A proactive individual who will improve systems and processes over time

Someone who is comfortable working with multiple systems and large volumes of transactions

Important



This role requires someone who is highly detail-oriented and persistent. You will be expected to follow up with team members to ensure all financial information is complete and accurate — no loose ends.



Bonus Skills (Not Essential)

Experience with property management software

KPI dashboard creation (Excel, Google Sheets, or reporting tools)

Understanding of UK property accounting (rent, deposits, contractor costs)

title: Looking for freelancers to create short how-to videos on online tools/software
description:
Hi everyone,



I’m currently looking for multiple freelancers to create short how-to / explainer videos for YouTube. I’m already working with a small team and looking to bring on several more people to increase output.



This is a simple screen-recording role where you explain how to do something step by step throughout the entire video.



We work with many different tools and software, some examples of tools and topics other freelancers have covered are:

- Canva: How to add a shadow to an image in Canva

- Shopify: How to add products in Shopify

- Mailchimp: How to find campaign ID in Mailchimp



There are thousands of topics available, and this is intended to be long-term, ongoing work.



How the workflow works:

- You will be assigned one software at a time (e.g. 
, Airtable, Asana, Klaviyo, etc.)

- You may need to spend some time familiarising yourself with that software before creating tutorials

- Each software includes a list of approximately 100 to 500 tutorial topics

- Your role is to work through as many topics as possible, ideally completing the full list

- Once finished, you will be assigned a new software and repeat the process



What the work involves:

- Recording short tutorials (usually 1–4 minutes, sometimes longer)

- Explaining clearly while navigating the software

- Basic editing (cutting mistakes, trimming pauses)

- Creating a simple thumbnail using a provided template I've created in Canva (quick and easy, mostly adding text)



Requirements:

- English fluency (minimum intermediate level) - this role is not suitable for freelancers with broken or difficult-to-understand English

- Clear audio quality

- A decent microphone with minimal background noise (noise reduction tools are fine, I recommend Krisp, SteelseriesGG, or Nvidia Broadcast for background noise removal)

- Ability to explain clearly and naturally (sounding confident is great!)

- Reliable and consistent, able to meet deadlines and communicate properly



Pay:

- $1 per approved video

- No cap on output

- You can produce 30 videos or 300 videos per week, completely up to you how many videos you want to create

- Please include how many videos you think you can produce weekly in your application



Time expectations (for transparency):

These are simple videos. Once you are familiar with the process, it is realistic to produce around 8-10 completed videos per hour (approximately $8-10 per hour), depending on tutorial lenght and complexity.



How to apply:

Please send a short sample how-to video created by you.



- It can be simple (e.g. how to change your desktop background)

- A more complex tutorial is preferred if possible

- Attach the file or send a Google Drive link (make sure it is set to public)



This will be used to evaluate:

- Your English level

- Your clarity when explaining

- Your on-screen presentation



Please do not apply with irrelevant video samples. I am not looking for a video editor, I am looking for freelancers to create screen recorded how-to tutorials, so please refrain from sending your video editing portfolio as this is not what I am looking for.

title: Build High-Converting Landing Pages (WordPress + Elementor + AI Tools)

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING:

FIRST PROJECT:



You’ll recreate a landing page with:

I will provide:

- Copy

Your job is execution. Nothing more, nothing less.



REQUIRED:

- Ability to follow instructions exactly

- Ability to move fast without breaking things



BONUS (not required):

IMPORTANT:



Most people overthink this. I don’t want that.



I want someone who:

- Communicates clearly



PAY:



- Project-based or hourly

TO APPLY:

If you miss that, I won’t respond.



DO NOT APPLY IF:

This is simple work for the right person.

If that’s you, apply.



Top applicants will be given a small paid test.

title: Character Illustrator-Animator / AI Visual Producer — Short-Form Videos
description:
Prismiera is building an identity forward jewelry brand using AI influencers. We're hiring a remote creative-production specialist to create, curate, and refine expressive character segments of varying styles for short-form social video. 



We can train and provide guidance on the AI pipeline relatively quickly, but the artistic talent and execution ceiling we're looking for is not something we can teach. Bring the character literacy and taste, strong character judgment matters more than existing AI tool fluency. You do not need to hand-draw or animate every asset from scratch, but you do need enough character-art vocabulary to judge expression, gesture, silhouette, emotional clarity, and consistency.



This is not a generic AI prompt-operator role and not a traditional frame-by-frame animation role. You'll create, curate, and refine expressive characters using AI tools, reference pools, and light manual edits where needed. You'll generate motion from curated stills using AI video tools, time clips to narration, and deliver finished 20–60 second segments.



Emphasis on Character-focused visual segments where the character's expression, pose, gesture, and motion carry the emotional beat of the narration.



The actual job is visual judgment under abundant AI output — repeatedly steering, selecting, rejecting, refining, and sequencing AI-generated visual output so it matches our visual style, emotional tone, and character identity. In practice, this means you'll often be choosing the right image or motion take from many AI outputs. 



What you'll do



Create, curate, and refine expressive character and environment stills using AI image tools and reference pools

Make corrections or light hand edits where AI output misses (gesture, expression, silhouette)

Generate motion from selected stills using AI video tools (Seedance2, Kling — training provided)

Curate ElevenLabs voiceover. - Guidance provided.

Sequence and time motion clips against narration audio

Deliver finished segments for short-form social video

Keep recurring characters consistent across many pieces

Help build reference systems, style notes, and visual judgment language over time

Document what worked, what failed, and why — so the system improves



The style we want

We like character work with high emotional expressiveness — diverse emotional grammar from shoujo to shonen - virality native illustrated character storytelling.

The work should feel alive and artist-directed, not randomly generated.



You might be a fit if you



Have some visual substrate in character work — illustration, comics, animation, storyboards, VTuber assets, visual novels, AI character work, or another medium where expression and character consistency matter

Have work that shows strong character taste

Can recognize and articulate why a character expression, gesture, or pose works (or doesn't)

Can keep one character feeling like the same person across multiple pieces

Have strong judgment under abundant AI output.

Demonstrate execution discipline — you finish work, you iterate cleanly, you ship completed videos autonomously under pressure and shifting artistic demand.

Are curious about AI image and motion tools, even if you haven't used them extensively yet

Can time visual beats to narration rhythm

Understand short-form social videos and virality sense

Communicate clearly and work well async

Have audience-validated work (YouTube, ArtStation, webcomic, Patreon, indie projects, etc.) — bonus, not required



Note on AI-assisted portfolios: AI-assisted work is welcome, but we will evaluate your taste/execution of scenes, character motion and overall aesthetics.



You're probably not a fit if you



Are mainly a prompt operator with no character art vocabulary or judgment

Pick the flashiest AI output rather than the most emotionally accurate one

Cannot diagnose why a character feels off (eyes wrong, gesture stiff, expression cold)

Are a video editor without character personality literacy

Are a pure animator looking for traditional frame-by-frame work

Work mainly in hyperrealistic or cool-detached styles - we are looking for someone who has the capacity to adapt quickly to different styles and artistic mediums, not just hyperrealism or hyper stylized.

Want a one-off gig rather than a stable long-term creative partnership



Compensation

$800–$1100 USD/month full-time depending on portfolio, taste calibration, and trial performance. Higher long-term compensation available for candidates who can own the full character ? motion ? timing workflow with autonomous brand judgment.

Trial period prior to confirmed engagement. Tool access or tool allowance provided — you won't need to use your own AI video credits for production work.

Proactive raises as you prove out and scope expands. We're not looking for a one-off gig relationship — we're looking for a long-term creative partner who grows with the brand.

Hiring process

Portfolio screen. Send:



Portfolio link - your best work

Pieces that show expressive acting or emotional range (illustration, animation, AI work, comics, VTuber, etc.)

Motion or sequence sample if available — animatic, short edit, Live2D/VTuber motion, AI motion, storyboard sequence, or simple timed visual piece

Short note on your current visual workflow and how you'd approach learning AI image and motion tools

Audience metrics or self-published projects, if any (optional but useful signal)

Include the phrase "character-first" in your application so we know you read the full post

Use at least 7 apply points



Shortlisted candidates move into a paid two-week trial that may convert to a confirmed monthly retainer.

I'll pay for different parts completed, the first initial brainstorming and generic design, detailed breakdown of cost and materials, etc.

title: Content Marketing & E-commerce Optimization Lead (SEO, AEO and GEO)
description:
Role Overview



Jomingo is a leading Singaporean natural personal care brand dedicated to sustainable, high-performance skincare. We are looking for a forward-thinking Content Marketing & E-commerce Optimization Lead to take our digital presence into the next generation of search.



You will be responsible for driving Search Engine Optimization (SEO), Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) strategies. Your goal is to improve Jomingo's visibility and authority across traditional search engines and AI-driven discovery platforms (like Gemini, Perplexity, and ChatGPT), ensuring our brand surfaces in conversational interfaces and AI-generated answers globally.



Key Responsibilities



1. Strategy & Planning



Define and execute a holistic SEO, AEO, and GEO strategy aligned with Jomingo’s brand and content priorities.



Anticipate shifts in the AI discovery ecosystem (generative search, AI assistants, voice search) and translate them into actionable growth approaches.



Partner with the founder and creative teams to embed optimization best practices from planning through execution.



2. SEO & Technical Optimization



Lead on-page, off-page, and technical SEO improvements, including site structure, metadata, internal linking, and schema markup on Shopify.



Monitor crawlability, indexation, and site health, proactively resolving technical issues.



Ensure SEO requirements are incorporated into CMS updates and new feature releases.



3. AEO & GEO Enablement



Optimize content and data structures to improve visibility in AI-generated answers, featured snippets, and voice responses.



Develop frameworks for structuring content to support entity recognition, topical authority, and trusted source signals.



Adapt content formats, tone, and structure specifically for AI-driven discovery engines.



4. Content & Editorial Optimization



Provide guidance for content creation, including keyword intent mapping, topic clustering, and semantic optimization.



Ensure evergreen and campaign content is optimized for discoverability and relevance across all digital channels.



Support scalable optimization frameworks for localized market efforts.



5. Performance & Analytics



Define KPIs and measurement frameworks for SEO, AEO, and GEO performance.



Track rankings, visibility, and AI-surface performance, translating data into clear, actionable recommendations.



Produce regular reports highlighting opportunities, risks, and impact on brand acquisition.



Role Requirements



Shopify Expertise: Proven experience optimizing E-commerce stores specifically on the Shopify platform.



AI Search Fluency: Deep understanding of how LLMs and Generative Search Engines (GEO) rank and cite brands.



Technical Proficiency: Strong grasp of Schema Markup (JSON-LD), site architecture, and Core Web Vitals.



Analytical Mindset: Ability to translate complex data from GA4, Search Console, and AI tracking tools into business growth.



Why Join Jomingo?



Work with Impact: Work directly with the Founder of the brand; your voice and strategy will directly shape the company’s future.



Flexible Autonomy: Enjoy flexible working hours—we value results and target achievement over "clock-in" times.



Timezone Alignment: We operate on the same timezone (Singapore/Philippines), ensuring seamless communication and no late-night meetings.



Agile Environment: No complex organizational structures or red tape; we move fast and value innovation.

title: Survey Fielding Manager – Opinion Research
description:
FOR APPLICANTS WITH HANDS-ON SURVEY PROGRAMMING AND FIELDING EXPERIENCE IN PUBLIC OPINION OR MARKET RESEARCH



Remote, (Eastern Time Zone)



Who You Are

You program survey instruments, manage the field, clean the data, coordinate with vendors, and keep projects moving on schedule. You've done this work hands-on at a research firm (not in an academic setting), and you're comfortable owning the technical execution of multiple projects at once.



You may be a fit if:

* You have programmed surveys in Alchemer, Qualtrics, or a comparable professional survey platform - and can set up skip logic, quotas, randomization, piping, and multilanguage surveys without hand-holding

* You've managed survey fielding from launch through close: monitoring quotas, tracking sample quality, and keeping projects on timeline

* You've coordinated with external vendors - panel providers, call centers, mail houses - and can manage those relationships independently

* You have experience with sample preparation: lists manipulation, deduplication, creating clean sample files, generating unique identifiers

* You are meticulous about data quality - you catch errors before they reach anyone else

* You take initiative, ask questions when something is unclear, and don't wait to be told what to do next

* You're comfortable jumping between multiple projects in a fast-paced environment

* You are proficient in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel and PowerPoint

* You can create basic graphics using AI, Canva, or Adobe tools



What you'll do:

* Program and test online surveys in our survey platform, including
 and texting campaigns, logic testing, and distribution setup

* Monitor and manage survey fielding: track quotas, sample quality, response rates, and project timelines

* Coordinate with external vendors - online panel providers, call centers, and mail vendors - and provide regular updates to internal project managers

* Prepare and clean sample files: create organized sample files, generate unique data fields

* Develop mail materials and coordinate with internal team and external mail vendors

* Perform data cleaning on survey outputs to verify data quality and integrity

* Code and analyze open-ended responses

* QC all deliverables: cross-check data sets, verify formatting, catch errors before client delivery

* Build charts, reporting visuals, and basic dashboards in PowerPoint, Canva, or Looker Studio

* Support the research team across the full project lifecycle



What we're NOT looking for:

Someone whose survey experience is limited to academic research or distributing simple online links



Required qualifications:

* At least one year of experience programming and fielding surveys in a professional opinion or market research setting

* Proficiency in online survey programming with a survey platform (tell us which ones you know well)

* Experience managing fielding for market research or public opinion research studies

* Experience with data cleaning and response monitoring

* Strong English writing, proofreading, and communication skills

* Bachelor's degree in marketing, political science, communication, business administration, or a related field



Preferred:

* Experience with SPSS, R, Wincross, or similar statistical/tabulation software



What we provide:

* A collaborative team

* A supportive environment where asking questions is encouraged

* Company-paid PhilHealth or HMO

* 13th month pay

* Paid time off



TO APPLY:

Send a link to your resume and LinkedIn profile. Also tell us:?

1. Which survey platform(s) have you programmed in, and approximately how many surveys have you built?

2. Describe one project where you managed fielding from start to finish - what was the methodology, and what did you personally handle?



Put Survey Fielding Manager in the subject line. Use 5 apply points.

I am Adam Probolsky. I will read your application personally. This position is available immediately.



About Probolsky Research: We are a Latina- and woman-owned market and opinion research firm working for corporate, election, government, and nonprofit clients.

/Instagram)

FULL SOPs + winning creative references provided

Paid test required for shortlisted candidates

Fast-paced environment with room to grow into a senior role



If you can create ads that actually drive revenue, we want to hear from you.



Best regards,

Romeo

title: AI-Augmented Laravel + Vue 2 Developer / Engineer (EU property-tech, remote)
description:
Title:

AI-Augmented Laravel + Vue 2 Developer / Engineer (EU property-tech, remote)



Role

We are looking for a strong, reliable engineer who likes to move fast with AI tools and still ships carefully. We care heavily about clear communication, good decisions, and a clean trial result.



About us

We are a European property-tech company. We maintain a long-running Laravel application with Blade, Vue 2, Bootstrap, and tenant-scoped data patterns. We use GitLab merge requests. We care about security, privacy, and small reviewable changes.



How we work

We use an AI-assisted development workflow. You are expected to use coding assistants to speed up analysis and implementation, but you treat generated output as draft work: clarify scope, plan the change, verify behaviour, keep diffs small, and prove changes with sensible and thorough checks and testing before review.



This role is a great fit if you like turning requirements into a short plan, using AI where it helps, keeping changes easy to review, and checking your work before you ask for feedback. It is not a fit if you want to ship large unreviewed blocks of AI-generated code.



What you will do

- Deliver scoped changes on a mature Laravel + Vue 2 codebase using AI-assisted methods safely.

- Open merge requests with clear descriptions, scoped commits, and tests where applicable.

- Communicate in writing about plan, trade-offs, and verification steps.



Requirements

- Demonstrable AI-assisted workflow in real product work (you can explain it concretely).

- Comfortable working in Laravel in a larger codebase, including reading and navigating existing code you did not write yourself.

- Comfortable with Vue 2 in production, or strong Vue experience with a clear plan to work within Vue 2 patterns in this codebase.

- Comfortable with Blade templates and web security (escaping, CSRF, safe handling of user input).

- Solid Git habits: branches, scoped commits, merge request workflow.

- Written English strong enough for async work with EU stakeholders.

- Ideally 4 to 6 hours overlap per workday with CET business hours (Monday to Friday). Please state your timezone and the CET window you can reliably cover each workday.



Nice to have

- AI-assisted work on legacy codebases (careful refactors, incremental upgrades, tenant-scoped features).

- Laravel Mix / Webpack and Docker-based local builds.

- Multi-tenant SaaS experience.



Trial (before any production access)

We run a mini-trial on a sandbox repository that mirrors our stack patterns but contains no production code or customer data. Timebox is about 4 to 6 hours, agreed upfront.



You may use AI tools during the trial, but you must not paste secrets, customer data, production logs, or private business information into external tools. You must be able to explain and defend everything you submit.



How to apply (English, no template letters)

1) Your current AI-assisted workflow: how you scope prompts, verify output, and prevent scope creep.

2) One example where an AI tool gave a wrong or risky suggestion. How did you catch it?

3) Either (A) walk us through one concrete merge request or commit you authored where AI was your primary tool: what you prompted, what came back, and what you changed before merge, or (B) if you cannot share a link, describe your first 30 minutes on an unfamiliar legacy Laravel/Vue task before you edit code.

4) How do you keep AI-assisted changes small and reviewable in a legacy monolith?

5) Multi-tenant safety: what checks would you do before changing a query that returns tenant-owned records?

6) What information must never be pasted into external AI tools? Name categories, not examples from real projects.



Do not apply if

- You are not the person who will do the work.

- You ship AI output without verification.

- You cannot describe your workflow concretely.

- You only have Vue 3 experience and cannot commit to Vue 2 patterns in this codebase.

- You would paste secrets, production logs, or customer data into external tools.

title: Operations Manager – Content & Digital Operations
description:
Full-Time | Monday–Friday | 40 Hours / Week



Company: Sun Production

Location: Remote (U.S.-based preferred)

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 40 hours per week

Employment Type: Full-Time



About Us

Sun Production is a full-service marketing and branding agency focused on helping businesses grow through strong digital presence, content execution, and operational consistency.

We are looking for a detail-oriented Operations Manager to oversee daily content operations, digital account management, and internal execution workflows.



This role is operations-focused, not a creative director position. You will execute defined processes, manage daily tasks, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks.



Position Overview

The Operations Manager is responsible for managing daily digital operations across Google Business, social media accounts, content workflows, and sales support tasks.

You will work closely with the Founder and external teams to ensure all assigned tasks are completed accurately, on time, and according to established SOPs.



Work Schedule

Monday–Friday

40 hours per week

Fixed daily schedule (to be confirmed during onboarding)

No weekend work

Key Responsibilities

Daily Operations

Monitor and respond to Google Business reviews daily

Ensure all reviews are replied to with brand-appropriate tone

Upload photos to Google Business when required

Confirm account health and status across assigned profiles

Social Media Operations

Manage assigned Instagram accounts

Post approved Reels and Stories only

Apply provided captions and hashtags

Engage with relevant content (likes and natural comments)

Ensure posts are published correctly and on schedule

Content & File Management

Complete assigned Canva tasks (thumbnails, story images, post visuals)

Save and organize files accurately in Google Drive

Follow strict folder structures and naming conventions

No independent design decisions unless instructed

Video Coordination (As Needed)

Review raw video files after filming days

Separate usable vs. unusable footage

Organize and label files for the editing team

Coordinate delivery status with external video editors

Sales Support Tasks

Review business cards and lead information provided by the Founder

Research business details via Google

Categorize leads (HOT / WARM / COLD)

Register leads in CRM

Create assigned sales kits

Meetings & Reporting

Participate in daily kickoff and wrap-up meetings

Maintain a daily task checklist

Provide end-of-day summaries and next-day priorities

Capture weekly performance screenshots (Instagram & Google Business)

Assist with monthly reporting and planning

Required Skills & Qualifications

Strong organizational and time-management skills

Experience with Google Drive, Canva, Instagram, and Google Business

Ability to follow SOPs precisely without repeated clarification

Excellent written English communication

Comfortable working in a structured, process-driven environment

Reliable, detail-oriented, and accountable

Performance Expectations

100% completion of daily assigned tasks

Zero missed reviews, uploads, or files

Consistent organization and documentation

Ability to execute independently once trained

Operating Structure

The Founder defines strategy, priorities, and direction.

The Operations Manager executes tasks, manages workflows, and ensures daily operations run smoothly.



How to Apply

Please respond via Craigslist with:



A brief introduction

Relevant work experience

Confirmation of availability for full-time (Monday–Friday) work

Qualified candidates will be contacted for the next step.

title: Creative Video Editor
description:
The Mission



At Vera Lane, we’ve disrupted the $100 billion skincare industry by removing the friction of shade-matching. Our "Skincare-Makeup Hybrid" uses self-adjusting technology to find a perfect match for mature skin instantly. We are looking for a Creative Video Editor who acts as a "multiplier"—a strategic partner who uses data to turn raw footage into high-performance assets.



The Role



You will join a fast-paced, four-person production team reporting to Cris Adrian (Paid Media Production Owner). You are not just an editor; you are a creative problem-solver responsible for driving ROAS, Hook Rates, and Retention.



Key Responsibilities:



High-Volume Output: Produce a diverse range of videos for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube, aiming to exceed weekly targets.



Creative Strategy: Review briefs to suggest optimizations that increase engagement and production speed. Do not just follow instructions; improve them.



Visual Excellence: Execute a premium, clinical aesthetic using bold Montserrat typography and high-key lighting.



AI Integration: Master AI tools to clone voices and generate B-roll to elevate storytelling and efficiency.



Data Application: Apply performance insights from our Creative Strategist to refine your editing style and hit "winning patterns."



Project Management: Maintain 100?curacy in file naming and time tracking via ClickUp and Clockify.



Requirements



DTC Background: Proven experience editing for e-commerce or direct-to-consumer brands.



Technical Mastery: Expert proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.



Performance Mindset: Ability to engineer "scroll-stopping" hooks and conversion-driven narratives.



AI Savvy: High-level experience using AI tools (voice cloning, AI B-roll generation) to enhance production workflows.



Operational Discipline: Strong ability to manage multiple projects and solve technical issues independently.



How to Apply



 your resume and your top three UGC videos showcasing your AI skills (voice cloning, AI B-roll, etc.) to: 



The Hiring & Trial Process



Our selection process is rigorous to ensure we find the right partner for our team:



Screening: A background and technical interview with Angel.



Edit Test: A practical video test to demonstrate your speed, technical skill, and creative logic.



Culture Fit: A final interview with the Paid Media Production Owner to ensure alignment with our high-performance mindset.



Paid Trial Period: Successful candidates will enter a mandatory probationary/test trial period. This serves as a working audition to evaluate your suitability for the role and your fit within the team's pace.



Full-Time Offer: A permanent full-time offer will only be extended upon the successful completion of the trial period and a proven track record of meeting our performance standards.

title: AI Video Editor - Pixar-Style Animated Ads (Skincare DTC Brand)

**WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR**

- Able to work from a brief and deliver with minimal back and forth

**WHAT YOU'LL DO**
