**TOOLS YOU MUST KNOW WELL**

--> Kling AI, Veo 3, Seedance 2.0, Nano Banana Pro, ChatGPT, CapCut (or similar)

Generic video editing experience is NOT relevant here.

We only want people who actively use these specific AI tools.



**?? [READ THIS BEFORE YOU APPLY] - APPLICATION REQUIREMENT**

You must attach at least 2–3 examples of AI-generated animated videos in a Pixar or 3D animated style. Generic reels, editing showreels, or AI image portfolios without animation will not be considered. Applications without relevant video samples will be declined immediately, no exceptions.



No samples = no reply.



Looking forward to building something great together. ????

title: Executive Operations & Automation Assistant
description:
HIRING: Executive Operations & Automation Assistant

Remote | Full-Time | Philippines Preferred | $650–$800/month USD

 

Overview

This is a full-time remote role supporting the founder of multiple growing brands — including IMPACT Barber Academy (Austin, TX and Corpus Christi, TX) and Coach Leonard Official, a coaching, education, and media ecosystem. The founder is a visionary operator building scalable systems across education, coaching, automation, enrollment, and digital products.

Your job is to take operational weight off the founder so they can focus on vision, strategy, partnerships, revenue, and growth. You will manage the day-to-day moving parts — communication, tasks, scheduling, systems, follow-through — and make sure things don't fall through the cracks.

This is NOT a passive virtual assistant role. You will be expected to think, act, and follow through without being chased.

 

Role Details

Hours: 40 hours per week (full-time)

Compensation: $650–$800/month USD depending on experience

Location: Remote — Philippines strongly preferred

Time Zone: Overlap with Central Time (Austin, TX) required — minimum 4–5 hours per day

Reports To: Founder directly

Start: As soon as the right person is identified

 

Core Responsibilities

Administrative & Executive Support

• Manage
 inboxes and draft professional responses

• Organize Google Drive files, folders, and documentation

• Manage calendars and coordinate scheduling

• Handle meeting coordination, reminders, and follow-up

• Create and maintain SOPs and operational documentation

• Keep project management systems current and organized

Communication Management

• Handle inbound text and
 inquiries professionally

• Manage admissions communication for barber school locations

• Reduce unnecessary live calls through text-first systems

• Implement and maintain automated communication workflows

• Ensure no lead or inquiry goes unaddressed

Automation & Systems Support

• Build and manage automations using Zapier and connected tools

• Help automate admissions workflows, enrollment follow-up, and lead nurturing

• Maintain CRM systems and ensure data accuracy

• Identify gaps in current systems and recommend improvements

• Support integration of AI tools into daily operations

Operations & Project Coordination

• Track tasks and ensure deadlines are met

• Keep projects moving forward across multiple brands

• Identify bottlenecks and flag issues before they escalate

• Create repeatable systems for recurring processes

• Organize priorities and coordinate execution across teams

 

Tools & Tech

You do not need to be a programmer. You must be highly comfortable with technology and able to learn new platforms quickly.

Required or Strong Preference:

• Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Calendar, Docs, Sheets)

• Zapier

• Claude AI / ChatGPT

• Notion or equivalent project management tool

• CRM systems

• Canva

• Scheduling software

Bonus Experience:

• OpenPhone or similar VoIP/text systems

• Thinkific or online course platforms

• Shopify

• Social media scheduling tools

• SOP creation for operational teams

• Online education or trade school environments

 

Who You Are

The right person for this role doesn't need to be told twice. They figure things out, follow through without reminders, communicate clearly, and build structure where there is none.

You are:

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Fast-moving and execution-focused

• Proactive — you identify problems before they become fires

• Independent — you don't wait to be told every step

• Reliable — you do what you say you will do

• A strong communicator in written English

• Comfortable with ambiguity in a fast-moving entrepreneurial environment

• Genuinely interested in AI and automation as operational tools

You are NOT:

• Someone who disappears when things get busy

• Someone who needs constant motivation or direction

• Someone who creates more chaos instead of less

• Someone who doesn't follow through

 

What Success Looks Like — First 90 Days

• Inboxes organized and managed consistently

• Calendar coordinated with no missed commitments

• Lead and inquiry follow-up system functioning with no leakage

• Key automations built and running in Zapier

• SOPs documented for recurring operational tasks

• Communication across both school locations handled professionally

• Founder has measurably less operational stress

• You are trusted and operating independently

 

How to Apply

Send the following to 

1. Your resume or portfolio

2. Examples of systems, automations, or workflows you have built

3. A list of tools and platforms you are experienced with

4. A short video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself and your work style

5. Your availability and time zone

6. Your answer to the screening question below

 

Subject Line — REQUIRED:

Use exactly this subject line or your application will not be reviewed:

"Execution Over Excuses"

Screening Question:

If you were hired today, what would be the FIRST thing you would improve in a growing business with too many moving parts and poor follow-through?

There is no single right answer. We are looking for how you think.

 

Growth Path

This role starts part-time or full-time depending on fit, and has a clear path to grow with the organization. Strong performers will be given more responsibility, higher compensation, and the opportunity to move into a Director of Operations or Chief of Staff-level role as the ecosystem scales.

We are building something. If you want to grow with it, this is the opportunity.

title: Video Marketing & Ads Growth Specialist (Real Estate Focus)
description:
The Role

I am looking for a marketing partner to turn raw video footage into lead generation. You will not only edit video but also manage Custom Audience Targeting using skip-traced property lists to ensure our ads are seen by specific high-intent homeowners and out-of-state landlords.



Responsibilities

Video Editing: Take raw phone footage and edit it into engaging YouTube Shorts and long-form videos with captions, hooks, and branding.

Data & List Management: Handle CSV uploads of skip-traced property lists (Non-Owner Occupied, Probate, etc.) into Google and
 Ads.

Custom Audience Targeting: Set up and manage Google Customer Match and
 Custom Audiences to retarget specific individuals from our lead lists.

Omni-Channel Retargeting: Ensure anyone who visits our website or appears on our "high-potential" lists sees our video ads across YouTube and social media.

YouTube SEO: Optimize video metadata to ensure we rank for local "Sell my house fast" keywords in the Salt Lake Valley.



Required Skills & Qualifications

Proficient in Video Editing: Expert in CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or DaVinci Resolve.

Ad Tech Mastery: Proven experience with Google Ads Manager, Customer Match, and Retargeting Pixels.

Data Handling: Comfortable cleaning and formatting CSV files for ad platform uploads.

Real Estate Knowledge: (Highly Preferred) Experience working with PropStream, BatchLeads, or similar REI data tools.

Language: Excellent written and verbal English skills.

Work Ethic: A "self-starter" attitude. I am looking for someone who works hard and takes ownership of the lead-gen results.



Why Work with Us?

Long-Term Growth: This is a permanent position for the right person as we scale our Salt Lake operations.

Direct Access: You will work directly with the owner, Eric.

Professional Impact: Your work will directly help local families solve difficult property problems.

title: Klaviyo Email Marketing Lead — Fast-Moving DTC Brand
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION:



Growing DTC ecommerce brand in the DACH market. Single hero product with strong emotional positioning targeting women 18–27. Front-end is performing.
 is not — and we are heading into our peak season (May–August). We need someone to take over Klaviyo and turn it into a real revenue channel, fast.



The honest situation:



We have Klaviyo set up with flows live, but the channel barely contributes revenue. Current execution feels generic — AI-looking visuals, weak copy, no brand voice. We are not looking for someone to maintain this. We need someone to audit it properly, rebuild what is broken, and start shipping campaigns that actually work.



How we want to start:

Week 1: Full audit of the entire Klaviyo account — existing flows, past campaigns, list health, segments, deliverability. Findings document with clear priorities for what to fix first.

Week 1–2: First flow rebuild goes live (your call which one to prioritize, you justify the decision based on the audit).

Week 2–3: First campaign goes out. Second flow rebuilt.

From there: Weekly campaign cadence, ongoing flow optimization, monthly performance report with insights and next steps.

We are not a huge brand. We move fast. We don't need three weeks of analysis before anything ships.

What you will own:

Klaviyo strategy and execution end-to-end. All flows: Welcome, Abandoned Cart, Browse, Post-Purchase, Win-Back. Weekly campaigns tied to brand storytelling, seasonality, and product moments — not discount-spam. Segmentation strategy for a single-product brand. A/B testing on subject lines, send times, creative. Customer lifecycle communication that also reduces support tickets and disputes.



What you need:

Minimum 2 years hands-on Klaviyo for ecommerce brands. At least one case study with concrete numbers (flow revenue, RPR, before/after). Strong English copywriting — our German team handles final localization, you write hooks, structure, English version. Strategic thinking and ownership — you propose, ship, report. Brand-led
 background, not discount-only.



What we don't want:

AI-generated visuals. Discount-only campaigns. Template-based execution. Slow communicators.



Compensation & growth path:

We start hourly so we both confirm fit. Strong performers move to a monthly retainer within 90 days — meaning more stable income, more ownership, and real upside as the brand scales. This role is built to grow with the business.



Communication:

Daily availability on Slack or WhatsApp during your working hours. Reply to messages within a few hours on workdays. Weekly 15-minute sync.



How to apply:

Start your application with the word MOMENTS. Then answer:



Show me one flow you rebuilt for an ecom brand with before/after numbers (open rate, click rate, RPR, total flow revenue).

What is your current weekly client load and how soon could you start?

Send me one example of a non-discount campaign
 you wrote. Raw copy is fine.



Applications missing the codeword, numbers in Q1, or a writing sample in Q3 will be deleted without reply.

title: Clarity Call Specialist
description:
Role Title: Clarity Call Specialist

Company: Avivar Co.

Location: Remote



About Avivar

Avivar is a clarity-first consulting firm. We work with business owners and leadership teams to realign operations, people, and performance from the inside out. Every engagement begins with a 20-minute Clarity Call.



This call is not a sales pitch. It is a moment of truth.



The Role:

We are hiring a Clarity Call Specialist to lead our initial client conversations.



You will be the first human interaction a potential client has with Avivar. Your role is to guide the conversation, understand the business at a high level, identify alignment, and determine if they are a fit for the next step.



You are not closing deals.

You are qualifying, building trust, and positioning the next step.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:

Conducting 20-minute Clarity Calls with business owners

Guiding structured conversations using Avivar’s framework

Asking the right questions to uncover real business challenges

Identifying whether the client is a fit for a Clarity Audit

Documenting key insights and handoff notes

Maintaining a calm, confident, and professional presence



What We’re Looking For:

Near-fluent to fluent English (this is non-negotiable)

Strong communication and listening skills

Ability to guide conversations without sounding scripted

Confidence speaking with business owners and leadership teams

Emotionally intelligent and able to read people quickly

Organized and structured in note-taking



Ideal Background (Preferred, not required):

Experience in sales calls, discovery calls, or consulting intake

Background in business, operations, or client-facing roles

Experience working with Western clients



What This Role Is Not

-This is not telemarketing

-This is not high-pressure sales

-This is not reading from a script



Why Avivar

You will be trusted with the front door of the business. This role directly impacts growth, client quality, and brand reputation. As the company scales, this role can evolve into a senior client strategist or sales lead.



To Apply

Submit:



1. Resume

2. Answer the following:

   “How would you guide a conversation with a business owner who says ‘everything feels messy, but I don’t know why’?”

title: Scriptwriter for NBA Themed YouTube Channel
description:
Are you a fan of NBA Classics? Larry Bird, Rodman, the 80s/90s when the game had real characters? Do you love writing AND know how to dig through the internet to find a 12-second clip from a 47-minute Barkley interview? You're in luck.

Please don't send a resume or cover letter. I don't care.

Here's what I care about:

? You've written for YouTube before, and you can prove it. Send 2–3 long-form scripts (40+ min) you've written, live on YouTube. Lead with anything that hit 100K+ views.

? You watch the NBA YouTube niche for fun. If you don't, this isn't the gig.

? You live and breathe AVD. Cold open, sag zones, sticky pockets, payoff timing — you should be able to articulate retention strategy for a 60-min video without me prompting.

? Researcher first, writer second. The scripts are interview-driven compilations. Every chapter is built from real quotes from real podcast/TV appearances — Barkley on Inside the NBA, Dominique on NBA TV, Payton on GP Show, Buck Williams from a 30-year-old broadcast. You hunt them down. Googling "Larry Bird trash talk quotes" doesn't cut it.

? Every clip with a timestamp. Non-negotiable. The editor cannot work off "insert Barkley clip here." Format:

CHARLES BARKLEY — FULL STORY

Source: 
 · 32:50–33:30

[transcribed quote]

Exact URL, exact in/out, transcribed quote underneath.

? Proactive. I won't micro-manage. You build the premise, the chapters, source the clips, and write the host V.O. that bridges them.

What a finished script looks like: chapter structure + host V.O. + sourced clips with URLs/timestamps + editor notes for placement and retention.

Let's see where this takes us.

title: 3D Car Modeler (Blender) — Grassroots Indie Racing Game
description:
About the Project



Grassroots Legends is an indie simcade racing game in active development, featuring 80s and 90s period vehicles across multiple disciplines (dirt track, rally, rallycross, road, and arena racing). Think beat-up everyday cars from that era, lightly prepped and sent wheel-to-wheel. The vibe is authentic grassroots motorsport, not polished GT cars.



The Role

We're looking for a part-time Blender artist to help optimize existing car models and contribute to the vehicle lineup. You'll be working closely with the creative director on a game that values authenticity. Knowing your Commodores from your Corollas, and basic motorsport understanding is highly valued.



What You'll Be Doing



Optimizing existing vehicle meshes (polygon reduction, LODs, UV cleanup) for game-engine performance

Maintaining visual accuracy on 80s/90s period cars across multiple racing disciplines

Communicating clearly with the creative director through revision rounds (English via discord or whatsapp)



What We're Looking For



Solid Blender skills with a vehicle modeling portfolio — show us real car work

Knowledge of 80s/90s cars valued, familiarity with grassroots/budget motorsport (dirt oval, rally, demo derby, etc.)

Understanding of real-time optimization: LODs, poly budgets, clean topology

Self-directed and reliable: This is a small indie project and we need people who take ownership



Nice to Have

Experience working on racing games or vehicle mods

Interior / cockpit design skills

PBR texturing skills



How to Apply

Send us: 

(1) a portfolio link with your best vehicle work, 

(2) background / interest in motorsport / cars, if any

(3) your expected hourly rate or typical rates per vehicle / optimization.



No portfolio = no consideration.

title: Salesforce Manual tester
description:
Job Title: Salesforce Tester or Salesforce QA Engineer or Salesforce Test Automation Engineer or CRM Platform Tester or Salesforce Manual Tester (Automation Growth Role) or Salesforce QA Tester or Salesforce QA Analyst or Salesforce Test Analyst



Location: Philippines / Remote



Working Hours: Part-time, Permanent, Fully flexible anytime



About Application House



Application House is a Salesforce consulting agency that operates three different business models consulting, product development and support.







We are truly reflecting the name House of the Application. We are developing a very advanced Application/Product that includes an Artificial Intelligence App including LLM hosted services, products like Uber, GCash, Grab, SMS/WhatsApp Messaging App, Fundraising & Payment App, etc.



Are you excited to join a brilliant, intelligent team? Then why wait? Go ahead and apply the role.



Role Overview



We are seeking an experienced QA Tester to support the quality and reliability of our Salesforce solutions. This role will focus on establishing and overseeing robust testing strategies across the platform, ensuring all releases meet high-quality standards. You will work closely with developers, SCRUM Masters, and the release manager to implement test automation, manage test cycles, and drive continuous improvement within the QA function.







You have the opportunity to learn using AI tools like Claude code and ChatGPT Codex to generate test script, test automation. We are an Artificial Intelligence (AI) company.





The tester will ensure end-to-end regression coverage for Lightning components, LWC-based UIs, and Salesforce UI, supporting CI/CD quality gates on the Salesforce platform.







This role involves working closely with developers, admins, and product managers to ensure that every release meets Application House’s high standards for reliability, performance, and user experience.







This role is ideal for a Manual Tester who wants to transition into Automation Testing using modern tools like UTAM, Selenium, Apex testing, and AI-assisted test generation.







Key Responsibilities



Review business and technical requirements to design comprehensive test plans and test cases.



Perform functional, regression, integration, and end-to-end testing on Salesforce applications.



Execute manual and automated test cases across multiple Salesforce environments.



Document defects clearly and track them through resolution using tools like Jira or Azure DevOps.



Perform manual exploratory testing to identify edge cases and usability issues



Execute UAT support and business validation testing



Validate data accuracy using SOQL queries and Salesforce reports



Test user permissions, roles, and sharing rules



Perform integration testing with external systems (QuickBooks, Stripe, Twilio APIs, etc.)



Test AppExchange package installation, upgrades, and uninstall scenarios



Validate mobile responsiveness and Salesforce Mobile App behaviour



Willing to learn automated UI tests using UTAM, Selenium, and other supported Salesforce automation frameworks.



Develop and maintain end-to-end regression suites for Salesforce managed packages (Lightning Web Components, Apex Controllers, Triggers, Flows).



Build data-driven test scripts for multiple Salesforce org environments (sandbox, UAT, production).



Integrate test execution within CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions / Bitbucket / Jenkins).



Collaborate with developers to identify automation candidates during sprint planning.



Maintain automation codebase, modular test models, and reusable components.



Log, track, and verify defects in Jira, working with developers for resolution.



Support cross-browser and device testing (Chrome, Edge, Firefox).



Ensure positive/negative test coverage for Lightning Record Pages and Salesforce UI.



Prepare test documentation: automation scripts, test data setup, test reports, and coverage metrics.



Contribute to manual-to-automation transition, reducing regression testing effort.



Stay current with Salesforce test automation tools, particularly UTAM, Provar, and Salesforce Testing Frameworks.







Required Skills & Experience



2–3 years of experience in software testing, including Salesforce testing.



2+ years of experience as a QA Tester with a focus on Salesforce platform (Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, etc.).



Experience writing clear and structured manual test cases



Understanding of test case design techniques (boundary value, equivalence partitioning, etc.)



Experience performing regression and exploratory testing



Basic knowledge of API testing (Postman or similar tools)



Strong knowledge of Salesforce features, workflows, validation rules, and security model.



Experience with test management tools.



Solid understanding of software testing lifecycle and QA methodologies.



Good if you have but not essential Hands-on with UTAM, Selenium, WebDriverIO, or Provar.



Good understanding of Salesforce data model, custom objects, triggers, flows, and Lightning pages.



Understanding or willingness to learn JavaScript or Java for automation scripting.



Familiarity with CI/CD and version control tools (Git, Jenkins, Bitbucket).



Proficient in using Test Management tools (Jira, TestRail).



Excellent analytical, debugging, and problem-solving skills.



Ability to work collaboratively in Agile/Scrum environments.



Own test strategy, governance & quality metrics



Hands-on Salesforce testing (Lightning, LWC, integrations, APIs)



Integrate tests into CI/CD (GitHub)



Mentor QA engineers and lead distributed teams







Preferred Qualifications



Salesforce Certified Administrator or Platform App Builder (advantageous).



Experience testing Salesforce projects.



Knowledge of Salesforce DX, Scratch Orgs, and Packaging Automation.



Familiarity with Salesforce UTAM Page Object Model and JSON-based configuration.



Understanding of Salesforce Lightning Design System (SLDS) and UI selectors.







Nice to Have (Automation Exposure)



Exposure to UTAM, Selenium, Playwright, or similar automation tools



Basic understanding of Apex test classes



Experience working with CI/CD pipelines



Exposure to Git version control







Tools & Technologies



Postman (API testing)



Browser DevTools (debugging)



Salesforce Developer Console / Workbench



TestRail or Zephyr







Why Join Application House



Work on real Salesforce AppExchange products used by global customers.



Exposure to Salesforce UTAM-based automation — one of the newest automation standards in the Salesforce ecosystem.



Collaborative global team (UK, India, Philippines) with continuous learning opportunities.



Competitive salary, flexible work hours, and performance bonuses.



Opportunity to grow into QA Lead or Salesforce Test Automation Architect roles.

title: Salesforce Automation tester
description:
Job description:



Job Title: Automation Tester for Salesforce



Location: Philippines / Remote



Working Hours: Part-time, Permanent, Fully flexible anytime







About Application House:



Application House is a Salesforce consulting agency that operates three different business models consulting, product development and support.

We are truly reflecting the name House of the Application. We are developing a very advanced Application/Product that includes an Artificial Intelligence App including LLM hosted services, products like Uber, GCash, Grab, SMS/WhatsApp Messaging App, Fundraising & Payment App, etc.

Are you excited to join a brilliant, intelligent team? Then why wait? Go ahead and apply the role.





Role Overview



The Automation Tester will design, develop, and maintain automated test scripts for Application House’s Salesforce products using UTAM (UI Test Automation Model), Selenium WebDriver, and other automation test frameworks.

The tester will ensure end-to-end regression coverage for Lightning components, LWC-based UIs, and Salesforce UI, supporting CI/CD quality gates on the Salesforce platform.

This role involves working closely with developers, admins, and product managers to ensure that every release meets Application House’s high standards for reliability, performance, and user experience.





Key Responsibilities:



Design and develop automated UI tests using UTAM, Selenium, and other supported Salesforce automation frameworks.

Develop and maintain end-to-end regression suites for Salesforce managed packages (Lightning Web Components, Apex Controllers, Triggers, Flows).

Build data-driven test scripts for multiple Salesforce org environments (sandbox, UAT, production).

Integrate test execution within CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions / Bitbucket / Jenkins).

Collaborate with developers to identify automation candidates during sprint planning.

Maintain automation codebase, modular test models, and reusable components.

Log, track, and verify defects in Jira, working with developers for resolution.

Support cross-browser and device testing (Chrome, Edge, Firefox).

Ensure positive/negative test coverage for Lightning Record Pages and Salesforce UI.

Prepare test documentation: automation scripts, test data setup, test reports, and coverage metrics.

Contribute to manual-to-automation transition, reducing regression testing effort.

Stay current with Salesforce test automation tools, particularly UTAM, Provar, and Salesforce Testing Frameworks.





Required Skills & Experience



2–3 years of experience in software testing, including automation testing.

Hands-on with UTAM, Selenium, WebDriverIO, or Provar.

Good understanding of Salesforce data model, custom objects, triggers, flows, and Lightning pages.

Strong knowledge of JavaScript or Java for automation scripting.

Familiarity with CI/CD and version control tools (Git, Jenkins, Bitbucket).

Proficient in using Test Management tools (Jira, TestRail).

Excellent analytical, debugging, and problem-solving skills.

Ability to work collaboratively in Agile/Scrum environments.





Preferred Qualifications:



Salesforce Certified Administrator or Platform App Builder (advantageous).

Experience testing Salesforce projects.

Knowledge of Salesforce DX, Scratch Orgs, and Packaging Automation.

Familiarity with Salesforce UTAM Page Object Model and JSON-based configuration.

Understanding of Salesforce Lightning Design System (SLDS) and UI selectors.





Tools & Technologies:



UTAM Framework (Salesforce official UI automation tool)

Selenium / WebDriver / WebDriverIO

Git / Jenkins / Bitbucket

Jira / TestRail / Confluence

Visual Studio Code with Salesforce CLI





Why Join Application House:



Work on real Salesforce AppExchange products used by global customers.

Exposure to Salesforce UTAM-based automation — one of the newest automation standards in the Salesforce ecosystem.

Collaborative global team (UK, India, Philippines) with continuous learning opportunities.

Competitive salary, flexible work hours, and performance bonuses.

Opportunity to grow into QA Lead or Salesforce Test Automation Architect roles.

title: Cold Caller - Remote (Real Estate)
description:
Job Title: Cold Caller (Disposition Focused – Real Estate Wholesaling)



Company: Homeward Partners – U.S.-Based Real Estate Investment Firm

Location: Remote (Central Time)

Employment Type: Full-Time (48 hrs/week)

Start Date: Immediate

Compensation: Base Pay + Commission + Performance Bonuses



How to Apply

Please share a 1–2 minute video introduction in English talking about your background, communication experience, and why you’d be a great fit for this role.

Drop your WhatsApp as well for Quick Communication.



About Homeward Partners

Homeward Partners is a rapidly growing U.S. real estate investment firm specializing in acquiring off-market residential properties and connecting them with cash buyers and investors.

We focus on efficiency, transparency, and results — delivering fair deals to sellers and profitable opportunities to investors.



About the Role

We’re looking for a Cold Caller with strong communication skills and a great U.S. accent to join our disposition team.

Your main responsibility will be to initiate contact with property owners, qualify leads, follow up with interested sellers, and assist in the deal disposition process — helping turn opportunities into closed contracts.



You don’t need prior disposition experience — if you’re confident, articulate, and eager to learn, we’ll provide all the training you need.



Key Responsibilities

Lead Generation & Qualification

Make outbound calls to property owners using company-provided scripts and tools.

Identify motivated sellers and qualify leads based on property condition, price expectations, and motivation level.

Accurately record call outcomes and update lead information in the CRM.



Disposition Support

Assist the disposition team in following up with warm leads and buyers.

Help schedule follow-up calls, send property details, and coordinate buyer communications.

Collect feedback from buyers and sellers to support faster deal closures.



Communication & Follow-Up

Maintain a high daily call volume with professionalism and persistence.

Develop rapport and build trust with property owners and investors.

Ensure all interactions are logged and categorized correctly in the system.



Performance & Growth

Meet and exceed weekly targets for call volume, lead generation, and follow-ups.

Participate in regular training and performance review sessions.

Grow into a Disposition Associate or Disposition Manager role based on performance.



Tools You’ll Use

Dialer: CallTools / BatchDialer / Mojo Dialer

CRM: ReSimpli / Podio / InvestorLift

Property Data: PropStream, Zillow, Redfin

Communication: Google Workspace, Slack

Reporting: Google Sheets, KPI Dashboards



Qualifications

Excellent spoken English with a U.S. accent (highly preferred).

Prior experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or customer service (preferred but not required).

Basic understanding of real estate wholesaling or disposition is a plus.

Confident, energetic, and motivated to hit performance targets.

Tech-savvy and comfortable using CRMs and dialer systems.

Strong communication, listening, and persuasion skills.

Ability to work during U.S. business hours (Central Time Zone).



Compensation & Growth

Base pay + attractive commission per closed deal.

Performance bonuses for top performers.

Paid training with hands-on guidance from the Disposition Team.

Clear growth path toward Disposition Associate ? Disposition Manager.

Long-term opportunity with a fast-growing U.S. investment firm.

title: Acquisition Specialist (Real Estate)
description:
Acquisition Specialist (Real Estate Wholesaling)



Company: Homeward Partners

Location: Remote (Central Time)

Job Type: Full-Time | 44–48 hrs/week

Compensation: Base Pay + Commissions + Performance Bonuses



How to Apply

Please share a 1–2 minute video introduction in English talking about your background, communication experience, and why you’d be a great fit for this role.

Drop your WhatsApp as well for Quick Communication.



About Homeward Partners



Homeward Partners is a fast-growing real estate investment firm specializing in acquiring off-market residential properties directly from homeowners. Our mission is to create win-win solutions — helping sellers achieve peace of mind while building strong, ethical real estate deals that create value for everyone involved.



We buy distressed, inherited, pre-foreclosure, vacant, or problem properties — always focusing on transparency, empathy, and integrity.



As an Acquisition Specialist, you are the first or second voice sellers hear from us — the bridge between their challenges and our solutions.



Your Mission



Your job is to connect with motivated sellers, uncover their real needs, and help negotiate win-win purchase agreements for our company.

You’ll represent Homeward Partners with professionalism, empathy, and drive — moving conversations from first contact to signed contracts.



Key Responsibilities



Seller Outreach & Communication

Call, text, and
 inbound/outbound seller leads.

Build rapport and trust through active listening, not pressure tactics.

Qualify sellers based on motivation, timeline, property condition, and financial situation.

Ask diagnostic questions to uncover challenges like inheritance, title issues, or foreclosure risks.



Deal Analysis & Negotiation

Evaluate property values using tools like PropStream, Zillow, or Redfin.

Analyze motivation and market data to make fair, strategic offers.

Negotiate purchase agreements that align with company goals while maintaining win-win outcomes for sellers.

Submit qualified deals to the Disposition Team with all relevant details and comps.



CRM & Follow-Up Management

Maintain consistent CRM updates for every seller conversation, note, and offer.

Schedule timely follow-ups for unconverted leads.

Track and report KPIs such as calls made, quality conversations, offers presented, and contracts signed.



Team Collaboration

Coordinate with the Disposition Team to ensure deal handoffs are smooth.

Share feedback and insights from sellers to improve marketing and acquisition targeting.

Participate in sales meetings, training sessions, and roleplays to sharpen skills.



Tools You’ll Use

CRM: ReSimpli or Podio

Dialer: CallTools, Readymode, Mojo, BatchDialer

Property Data: PropStream, Zillow, Redfin, ChatGPT (for comps)

Communication: Google Workspace, Slack, WhatsApp

Tracking: Google Sheets, KPI dashboards



Qualifications

1–2 years of experience in real estate acquisitions, cold calling, or high-volume sales.

Excellent English communication skills (verbal and written).

Strong negotiation and problem-solving skills with a focus on empathy.

Organized, detail-oriented, and consistent with CRM documentation.

Comfortable working full-time U.S. hours (Central or Eastern Time).

Tech-savvy and able to learn new systems quickly.



Preferred Experience:

Prior experience talking to distressed or motivated sellers.

Understanding of real estate transactions, contracts, and title processes.

Familiarity with DISC personality profiles and rapport-based communication.



Compensation & Growth

Base hourly rate (DOE) + generous commissions per closed assignment

Performance-based bonuses

Paid training and continuous support

Clear promotion path to Senior Disposition Manager / Team Lead

Long-term opportunity with a fast-scaling U.S. investment firm

title: Disposition Specialist (Real Estate)
description:
Disposition Manager (Real Estate Wholesaling)



Company: Homeward Partners (U.S.-based Real Estate Investment Firm)

Location: Remote (Central Time)

Employment Type: Full-Time (48 hrs/week)

Start Date: Immediate

Compensation: Base Pay + Commissions per Closed Deal + Performance Bonuses



How to Apply

Please share a 1–2 minute video introduction in English talking about your background, communication experience, and why you’d be a great fit for this role.

Drop your WhatsApp as well for Quick Communication.



About Homeward Partners



Homeward Partners is a fast-growing real estate investment company specializing in buying off-market residential properties and selling them to a curated network of cash buyers and investors. We focus on transparency, speed, and results — offering sellers quick, fair deals and investors high-value opportunities.



As our Disposition Manager, you’ll be responsible for turning signed contracts into closed deals — marketing properties, managing buyer relationships, negotiating assignments, and coordinating closings.



Core Mission

Your mission is simple: turn inventory into cash by selling contracts quickly and profitably while maintaining strong relationships with our investor network.



Key Responsibilities



Property Marketing & Buyer Outreach

Launch new deals to buyers within hours of contract execution.

Market properties using
 campaigns, CRM blasts,
 groups, Craigslist, and other investor channels.

Create engaging property listings and buyer packets with all key details (ARV, comps, rehab estimates, pictures).



Buyer Relations & Negotiation

Build, grow, and maintain a strong network of cash buyers and investor partners.

Negotiate assignment fees and contract terms that maximize company profit.

Follow up daily with buyers through calls, texts, and
s to create urgency and close quickly.



Transaction Coordination

Coordinate with title companies, escrow officers, and attorneys to ensure smooth closings.

Track deal progress, resolve title or buyer issues, and maintain clear communication across all parties.

Ensure accurate, compliant documentation for each transaction.



Market Research & Feedback Loop

Run comps using PropStream, Zillow, Redfin, and ChatGPT tools.

Stay updated on local market conditions, investor trends, and pricing benchmarks.

Provide insights to the acquisitions team for better property selection and pricing strategy.



Reporting & CRM Management

Keep CRM updated with all buyer interactions, notes, and statuses.

Track KPIs: time-to-market, engagement, contracts assigned, and closing ratios.

Generate weekly disposition performance reports for management review.



Tools You’ll Use

CRM: ReSimpli, Podio, or InvestorLift

Property Data: PropStream, Zillow, Redfin

Communication: CallTools / BatchDialer / Google Workspace

Marketing:
/SMS tools, Canva, ChatGPT,
/Craigslist

Tracking: Google Sheets, KPI Dashboards



Qualifications

1–3 years of experience in real estate wholesaling, dispositions, or investment sales.

Strong negotiation, relationship-building, and communication skills.

Confident with property valuation, comps, and real estate contracts.

Excellent written and spoken English.

Tech-savvy, detail-oriented, and capable of working independently.

Self-motivated and results-driven, with a passion for closing deals.



Preferred:

Existing network of U.S. real estate investors and cash buyers.

Familiarity with ReSimpli, InvestorLift, or similar CRM platforms.

Experience with
 marketing for real estate.

Compensation & Growth

Base hourly rate (DOE) + generous commissions per closed assignment

Performance-based bonuses

Paid training and continuous support

Clear promotion path to Senior Disposition Manager / Team Lead

Long-term opportunity with a fast-scaling U.S. investment firm

title: SENIOR FB ADS + Google ADS specialist 6+ Years experience
description:
About the Companies

Razzaque Paradise Properties are growth-driven companies operating in competitive real estate markets. We are focused on lead generation and acquisition, not vanity metrics. Our goal is simple: consistent, high-quality real estate leads that convert into deals.



We are looking for a top-tier Paid Ads Specialist with deep, hands-on experience in real estate
 Ads and Google Ads to take ownership of our acquisition funnel.



The Role

We are hiring an experienced Real Estate
 & Google Ads Specialist with at least 5 years of proven experience running paid acquisition campaigns in real estate.



This role is for someone who understands real estate buyer and seller psychology, knows how to build funnels that convert, and can optimize campaigns for cost per lead, cost per acquisition, and deal quality.



This is not an entry-level role. We want a strategic operator, not just an ad launcher.



Key Responsibilities

• Plan, launch, and scale
 Ads and Google Ads for real estate acquisition

• Build and optimize full-funnel campaigns (cold traffic ? retargeting ? conversion)

• Generate qualified buyer and seller leads, not junk traffic

• Continuously optimize for CPL, CPA, ROAS, and lead quality

• Write and test high-converting ad creatives, copy, and audiences

• Set up and manage tracking (Meta Pixel, Google Tags, conversions, events)

• Analyze performance data and make data-driven decisions

• Identify and fix funnel bottlenecks quickly

• Collaborate with internal teams to improve lead follow-up and conversion



What We’re Looking For

• Minimum 6 years of hands-on experience running
 & Google Ads for real estate

• Proven track record in real estate lead generation and acquisition

• Strong understanding of buyer/seller funnels and local market targeting

• Experience with high-spend accounts and scaling winning campaigns

• Ability to manage budgets responsibly and profitably

• Highly analytical, results-driven, and detail-oriented

• Self-starter who takes ownership and accountability



What Success Looks Like

• Consistent flow of high-quality real estate leads

• Stable and scalable acquisition systems

• Improved CPL and CPA over time

• Clear reporting and transparency on performance

• Direct contribution to closed deals and revenue growth



Why Work With Us

• Serious brands with real budgets and clear acquisition goals

• Long-term opportunity for the right performer

• Full ownership of the paid ads channel

• Results-focused environment (no micromanagement, no fluff)



If you are a real estate paid ads expert who knows how to drive acquisition—not just clicks—we want to hear from you.

title: Elite Video & Photo Editor for Athlete Brand (Long-Term, Remote)
description:
About Us:

We are building a high-performance personal brand around a competitive tennis athlete, with a focus on premium content across social media, branding, and digital platforms.



This is not basic editing work. We are creating content that needs to compete with top-tier creators and sports brands.



?



Role Overview:

We’re looking for a skilled video & photo editor who can produce clean, modern, high-impact content.



You will be responsible for turning raw footage into engaging, professional-level outputs that feel polished, fast-paced, and brand-consistent.

Responsibilities:



* Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

* Edit longer-form content (YouTube / storytelling videos)

* Enhance and retouch photos (athlete, lifestyle, branding)

* Add motion graphics, subtitles, transitions where appropriate

* Maintain consistent visual style across all content

* Deliver work on time with minimal supervision



?



Requirements:



* Strong portfolio (REQUIRED — do not apply without examples)

* Experience editing for social media (fast-paced, engaging style)

* Proficiency in tools like Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, Lightroom

* Good understanding of pacing, storytelling, and visual trends

* Reliable internet and communication

* Ability to follow direction but also bring creative input

* Experience with sports or fitness content

* Understanding of personal branding / content growth

* Motion graphics or animation skills



Work Setup:



* Remote (Philippines preferred)

* Part-time or full-time depending on performance

* Long-term opportunity for the right person



?



Compensation:



* Competitive and based on experience

* Performance-based increases over time



?



IMPORTANT — HOW TO APPLY:



To be considered, you MUST include:



1. Portfolio (video + photo work)

2. Your favorite project and why

Applications without these will be ignored.

title: Sales Admin Manager
description:
Here is the revised summary for the Contractor - Sales Administrator position. All company-specific branding has been removed, and the non-negotiable technical requirements have been emphasized.  



Job Overview

This role serves as the primary conduit for domestic trade customer orders and administrative needs across the USA, UK, and Europe. The successful candidate takes full ownership of the Order-to-Cash (O2C) cycle, ensuring the accurate delivery of goods from 3PL warehouses to major global retailers.  



Non-Negotiable Qualifications

Experience Level: Minimum of 5+ years of professional experience in a fast-paced consumer goods sales administration, customer service, or operations environment.



EDI Expertise: Must have hands-on experience managing the order-to-cash process via EDI with major retailers. This includes working knowledge of transaction sets 850 (PO), 856 (ASN), and 810 (Invoice), as well as the ability to troubleshoot EDI exceptions.



US Retail & Compliance: Direct experience using US big-box retail vendor portals (e.g., Walmart Retail Link, Target Partners Online, Costco Supplier Portal) is required. Candidates must be familiar with retailer routing guides, vendor scorecards (e.g., Walmart OTIF), and chargeback management.



Key Responsibilities

Order Fulfillment: Process customer orders and coordinate shipment routing with carriers within strict delivery windows.



Invoicing & Payments: Execute customer invoicing and monitor payment activity.



System Maintenance: Onboard new customers and manage item setup within the NetSuite ERP system.



Stakeholder Liaison: Act as the main point of contact for retail operations teams and collaborate internally with Sales, Finance, and IT departments.



Work Arrangement & Location

Location: Candidates must be located in Metro Manila, NCR.



Schedule: Full-time, Monday to Friday, 4:00 PM to 1:00 AM PHT.



Setup: This is a remote, work-from-home position. A dedicated workspace and stable high-speed internet are mandatory; a laptop is provided.



Term: Renewable 1-year contract.

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (Gig) — Work Health & Safety Compliance Management Software
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a skilled Senior Full-Stack Developer for gig-based work on a production-grade, multi-tenant SaaS platform focused on work health and safety compliance management.



You will be working from Figma designs and are expected to deliver pixel-perfect implementations while integrating AI-powered features into the existing application. This is not a beginner role.



What You Will Do



UI/UX Implementation — Translate Figma designs into pixel-perfect components within our existing Next.js application

App Development — Build and extend features across our React-based frontend and backend

AI Integration — Integrate AI capabilities into the platform in a meaningful, production-ready way

Logic & Refactoring — Modify existing Server Actions and components to support new workflows and features

Bug Fixing — Identify and resolve UI regressions or logic errors during development





Tech Stack (Must Have)



Next.js 15 (App Router) — Server Actions used extensively

TypeScript (Strict) — No any types; type safety is a priority

Styling — Tailwind CSS, Radix UI, Shadcn UI

Database — PostgreSQL with Kysely query builder (via Neon)

State Management — React Context & React Hook Form with Zod validation

AI Integration — Hands-on experience integrating LLMs or AI APIs into production applications





Bonus Skills



Experience with file uploads to AWS S3 via presigned URLs

Replicache or Local-First sync strategies

MLOps or AI model monitoring experience





Who You Are



You pay attention to detail — if the design has 16px padding, you don't make it 20px

You're comfortable working in a large, existing codebase without breaking unrelated features

You communicate clearly and flag issues early

You can work independently from design files with minimal hand-holding





Selection Process

Shortlisted candidates will be required to complete a paid test task — you will be provided with a Figma design and asked to implement it as a fully functional component within our tech stack. This is how we assess real-world fit before committing to ongoing work.



How to Apply

To confirm you've read this post, please do the following:



Send a message with the subject line: "WHS Developer Application - [Your Name]"

Include a link to your portfolio or GitHub profile

Answer this question in your application: "What is your preferred method for handling form validation in Next.js Server Actions?"

Share your availability — immediate start preferred

title: Associate Director for Short Term Rentals Business
description:

title: Virtual Assistant - Law Firm Operations
description:
We are a virtual estate planning law firm based in New York City. We help young families protect what they've built. The firm launched in April 2026 and is growing fast.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Monitor our lead inbox and reply to incoming inquiries using pre-written templates. Keep our CRM (Lawmatics) accurate, moving contacts through pipeline stages and applying the right tags. Schedule calls and meetings once the attorney has confirmed interest. Send a Friday numbers report: leads, calls booked, deposits collected, stuck contacts. Schedule and post pre-approved content to Google Business Profile and LinkedIn.



WHAT I NEED FROM YOU

You take initiative. You notice what needs doing and do it without being asked. Strong written English. Client-facing communication must be clear, warm, and professional. Comfortable learning new software quickly. We will train the right person. Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace. Prior legal or professional services experience is a plus, not required.



AVAILABILITY

You must be available during US Eastern business hours, 9:30am to 5:30pm EST, Monday through Friday. We are starting at 20 hours per week with a clear path to full time as the firm grows.



COMPENSATION AND GROWTH

$400/month to start for 20 hours per week. Strong performers will be considered for a full-time role at $1,000/month as the firm grows. This is a real path, not a maybe.



TOOLS YOU WILL USE

Lawmatics, Google Workspace, Canva, Slack, and others. Experience with any of these is a plus. We will train the right person.



TO APPLY

Send three things. Applications missing any of the three will not be considered.

1. Write a paragraph on why I should hire you for this role specifically. Not a list of your experience. Describe it to me.

2. A lead comes in Monday morning while the attorney is on a call. You have a pre-written reply template but something about their situation doesn't quite fit it. What do you do?

3. What would you do in your first week to make yourself useful without being asked?



Qualified applicants will be invited to a short Zoom interview before any offer is made.

title: IoT Developer - Raspberry Pi + ESP32 Door Access System (Python/MQTT)
description:
## Project Overview



I need help finishing an IoT door access system for gyms/facilities. The system uses a Raspberry Pi as a local controller and ESP32 boards at each door. Members unlock doors by tapping their phone (BLE) or scanning a QR code.



Most of the infrastructure is already built — I need someone to wire up the remaining logic and get it to production-ready. This is a short-term gig, not ongoing maintenance. I'm looking to have this wrapped up within 8-10 days.



**Full technical spec:** 



I have two existing repos (Python for the Pi side, Arduino/C++ for the ESP32 side) that I'll share once we agree on scope. The spec above has everything you need to evaluate the work.



## What's Already Done



- ESP32 firmware (BLE input, MQTT client, relay control, OTA updates, WiFi captive portal) — working

- Pi: MQTT broker (Mosquitto), admin web panel (Flask), device management UI, captive portal — working

- Pi: MQTT listener daemon that receives ESP32 messages and stores device state in SQLite — partially done

- Cloud API endpoints for membership/access data (Laravel) — live in production



## What Needs To Be Done



**Core (must-have, P0):**

- Connect the access flow end-to-end: Pi receives access request from ESP32 via MQTT, checks membership against cloud API, sends unlock command back (or fires a relay HAT on the Pi directly)

- Local access caching (SQLite) so doors still work when internet is down

- Door hours enforcement (deny access outside configured open/close times)

- Pi-side GPIO code to pulse a 4-channel relay HAT when the relay is on the Pi rather than the ESP32



**Secondary (P1, would like included):**

- Access log page in admin panel (who scanned, which door, granted/denied, timestamp)

- Manual unlock button in admin panel (buzz a door open remotely)

- Sync status indicator (when was access data last refreshed from cloud)



**Optional (P2+, if time allows or as follow-up):**

- QR scanner support on ESP32 (UART serial read, C++)

- OTA firmware management from admin panel



## Skills Needed



- Python 3 (Flask, paho-mqtt, SQLite)

- Raspberry Pi GPIO (RPi.GPIO or gpiozero) for relay HAT control

- Understanding of MQTT pub/sub patterns

- Comfortable reading existing code and working within an established architecture

- Bonus: Arduino/C++ for ESP32 firmware (for QR scanner piece)

- Bonus: experience with IoT systems, access control, or similar hardware projects



## Timeline & Budget



- **Timeline:** 8-10 days to complete P0 + P1 items

- **Type:** Fixed-price gig (not hourly, let's agree on a price for the scope)

- **Communication:** Async is fine, but I'd like daily check-ins or progress updates

- **Repos:** Will be shared via GitHub once we kick off



## Working Setup



- Pi runs Raspberry Pi OS (Bullseye+), services managed via systemd

- ESP32 firmware is Arduino-based (PlatformIO or Arduino IDE)

- Python dependencies: Flask, paho-mqtt, gpiozero/RPi.GPIO

- I have hardware (Pi + ESP32 + relay HAT) for testing on my end

- Remote work — you won't need physical hardware access, I can test on my units and share results



## To Apply



Please review the full spec linked above and include in your proposal:

1. Your relevant experience (Pi, MQTT, IoT, Python)

2. Estimated timeline for P0 items specifically

3. Your fixed price for P0+P1 scope

4. Any questions or suggestions (especially on the relay HAT — open to alternatives)

title: Executive Assistant (Operations Support) — High-Level Execution Role
description:
Executive Assistant (Operations Support) — High-Level Execution Role



Position: Part-Time (with potential to grow Full-Time)

Compensation:$450/month

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 10:30 AM – 3:00 PM EST (includes 30-minute unpaid break)



---



Role Overview



We are hiring a high-caliber Executive Assistant who operates as an execution partner not a task-taker. This role requires someone who can think, d
, and move things forward without constant direction.



You are not here to “assist” in the traditional sense—you are here to **own, execute, and ensure outcomes happen.



---



Key Responsibilities



Executive Support & Time Protection



* Manage the CEO’s calendar, inbox, and daily schedule with precision and strategic prioritization

* Protect the CEO’s daily 4-hour content creation block (no meetings, no interruptions, no exceptions unless critical)

* Filter, prioritize, and respond to communications on behalf of the CEO



**Operations & Execution**



* Act as the operational bridge across the team—ensuring alignment, clarity, and follow-through

* Track tasks, deadlines, and deliverables across all departments

* Identify bottlenecks and proactively solve them without waiting for instructions



Team Coordination & Oversight



* Coordinate communication between tea
mbers and leadership

* Stay closely aware of team performance, output, and daily activities

* Serve as the CEO’s “eyes and ears” across operations—flagging issues, gaps, and opportunities



Business & Personal Coordination



* Handle both business and personal logistics with discretion and efficiency

* Manage scheduling, coordination, and administrative tasks end-to-end



Payroll & Administrative Support



* Review payroll to ensure all tea
mbers are accurately accounted for before CEO approval

* Verify attendance, deliverables, and accountability metrics



Delegation & Authority



* Execute delegated tasks with full authority from the CEO

* Drive completion of tasks by following up, pushing when needed, and ensuring results

* Hold tea
mbers accountable to deadlines and standards



---



What We’re Looking For



Non-Negotiables



* High ownership mentality — you take responsibility and finish what you start

* Strong execution skills — you move fast, think clearly, and get things done

* Excellent communication — clear, direct, and professional

* Highly organized with strong attention to detail

* Proactive problem-solver — you don’t wait, you act



Experience & Skills



* Proven experience as an Executive Assistant or in a similar high-level operations support role

* Experience supporting fast-paced teams or founders is highly preferred

* Familiarity with project management tools, CRMs, and communication platforms

* Ability to manage multiple priorities without losing quality



Mindset



* Not a “push-button” assistant — you think, d
, and execute

* Comfortable operating with authority and holding others accountable

* Solutions-oriented with a bias for action



---



Application Instructions (Mandatory Requirements)



To be considered, ALL submissions must include the following:



1. Updated CV or Portfolio



   * Must clearly show relevant **Executive Assistant experience**



2. Video Introduction (2–3 minutes)



   * Introduce yourself

   * Explain your experience specifically related to the **Executive Assistant / Operations role**

   * Highlight how you operate as an executor, not just a task follower



3. Contact Details



   * Active
 Address

   * WhatsApp Number



4. Subject Line Format:

   Executive Assistant Application – [Your Name]



Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Send your application to: **[Insert
 Here]



---



Important Note



This role is for someone who wants to operate at a high level, take ownership, and grow into a key operator within the business. If you are looking for a passive, task-based role, this is not the right fit.



---

title: Executive Appointment Setter/Closer (High-Performance Sales Role | American Accent Required)
description:
Executive Appointment Setter / Closer (High-Performance Sales Role | American Accent Required)



We are hiring a high-caliber Executive Appointment Setter with a proven track record of closed-won sales, not just booking appointments. This is a performance-driven sales role with a clear pathway into advanced sales execution through structured training.



This is NOT a beginner role. We are looking for someone who can think, execute, and convert with minimal supervision.



Position Details

Role: Executive Appointment Setter (Sales Performance Role)

Type: Part-Time (with potential for long-term expansion)

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 10:30 AM – 3:00 PM EST (includes 30-minute unpaid break)

Base Pay: $400 – $600/month (depending on experience)

Commission: 5% on closed-won sales

Leads: Provided (with occasional support for lead generation if needed)

Role Overview



You will be responsible for handling high-quality sales conversations, qualifying prospects, and booking appointments with strong conversion intent.



This role requires someone who is not only able to set appointments but can also demonstrate real sales ability and closing experience.



You must be confident, intelligent in conversation, and capable of operating independently with minimal guidance.

Maintain CRM accuracy, pipeline tracking, and lead status updates

Execute structured follow-ups to maximize conversions

Appointment setting excellence

Advanced objection handling

Sales psychology and conversion strategy



Upon successful completion and demonstrated mastery, candidates will transition into advanced sales closing responsibilities within the organization.



Progression is strictly performance-based, not time-based.



Requirements

Strong English communication skills with a neutral/US-native level accent

Experience using CRM systems and sales pipelines

Ability to work independently and manage time effectively

Strong emotional intelligence and persuasive communication ability

High discipline, consistency, and execution speed

What We Are NOT Looking For

Beginners or entry-level appointment setters

Script readers with no closing experience

Candidates who require heavy supervision

Non-American accent profiles

How to Apply (Mandatory Requirements)

Updated CV or Portfolio (must include relevant sales experience and closed-won results)

Video Introduction (2–3 minutes)

Introduce yourself

Explain your sales experience

Highlight actual closed-won deals and how you achieved them

Explain why you believe you are a high-level executor in sales

 Address

WhatsApp Number

Subject Line: Executive Appointment Setter – [Your Name]

Important



Only applicants who meet the above requirements will be reviewed. This is a high-performance sales position focused on results, not activity.

title: Experienced Brand Manager Assistant to support 12+ Amazon brands for growth, execution, drive performance and operation
description:
Role Overview



We're hiring a Brand Manager Assistant who will work directly under the Senior Brand Manager to execute day-to-day brand operations. This is a hands-on role focused on the “legwork” that drives performance: optimizing listings, managing keyword research, coordinating creative projects, and pulling actionable data.



If the Senior Brand Manager sets the playbook, the Associate Brand Manager runs the plays — ensuring everything gets executed on time, correctly, and at a high level.



Key Responsibilities

1. Listing Management & Optimization

Create, update, and fully optimize Amazon product listings (titles, bullets, descriptions, images, videos, A+ content).

Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis to improve rankings and visibility.

Ensure all listings remain Rufus and Cosmos compliant with Amazon’s latest requirements.

Test content variations (A/B testing) to improve CTR and conversions.



2. Data Research & Analysis

Pull performance data from Amazon Seller Central and external tools (Data Dive, Helium 10, Jungle Scout).

Identify trends, keyword shifts, and competitor activity.

Provide actionable recommendations to the Senior Brand Manager to improve conversions, CTR, and sales velocity.



3. Cross-Team Collaboration

Work closely with the graphic design team to request, coordinate, and deliver images, infographics, and A+ creatives.

Partner with the marketing team to support product launches, promotions, and review-generation initiatives.

Ensure all projects are aligned with deadlines, strategy, and brand guidelines.



4. Conversion-Focused Execution

Continuously update and refine listings to improve conversion rates and customer engagement.

Maintain Amazon Brand Stores, A+ content, and ad creatives for consistency and performance.

Assist in preparing assets for influencer campaigns and external marketing pushes.



5. Project & Compliance Support

Own the administrative “heavy lifting” of flat files, bulk uploads, and catalog troubleshooting.

Flag compliance issues, unauthorized sellers, or listing errors for quick resolution.

Support market expansion efforts by preparing research and draft listings for new product opportunities.



Skills & Qualifications



2+ years experience in Amazon FBA operations, brand management, or digital marketing.

Proficient in Amazon Seller Central, flat files, listing creation, and troubleshooting.

Strong skills in SEO, keyword research, and listing optimization.

Data-driven mindset; confident in Google Sheets and reporting.

Strong communication skills to work cross-functionally with design, marketing, and operations teams.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple deadlines.



What Success Looks Like

Every listing across assigned brands is fully optimized, compliant, and performing.

Senior Brand Manager receives clear, accurate reports and recommendations.

Creative assets are delivered on time because you coordinated smoothly with design.



Product launches happen seamlessly with marketing and review strategies in place.

Conversions and rankings consistently improve due to your execution. If you feel you are the right fit, please respond to the job with the title " The Best Supporting Branding Manager Out There!"



Please respond directly to :

----------



Kind Regards,

title: Junior UI/UX Designer — Long-Term Remote Role — Fast-Growing SaaS Platform
description:
About the Role

We are a growing SaaS company with a live, AI-powered platform. We are hiring a junior UI/UX designer to join our design team and work alongside our senior designer and lead engineer.



This is a long-term, multi-year, remote, full-time opportunity for someone who wants to grow with a company from the ground up.



What You Will Be Doing

Cleaning up visual inconsistencies in our current user portal

Designing screens in Figma based on specs from our senior designer

Renaming, reorganizing, and aligning UI elements across the platform

Helping us prepare for a major platform rebuild over the next 5-8 months

Learning and growing under the direction of our senior designer



What We're Looking For:

Working knowledge of Figma (must be comfortable with components, auto-layout, and basic design system concepts)

Some UI/UX design experience — even small projects, school work, or freelance work counts

A good eye for detail — you notice when things are misaligned, off-color, or inconsistent

Willingness to learn and take direction from our senior designer

Reliable and consistent — you show up, communicate clearly, and finish what you start

Good written English

Full-time availability (40+ hours per week)



Experience level: Junior is fine. We care more about attitude, eye for detail, and willingness to learn than how many years you have been designing.



How to Apply

To apply for this role, please fill out our short application form here. Copy and paste this link into your browser:





The form takes about 5 minutes and asks for your portfolio link, design tools, expected hourly rate, availability, and a short answer question about a SaaS product you currently use.



Important: We will only review applications submitted through the form. 



Please do not send your full application as a message through OnlineJobs — use the form link above. 



Applications without a portfolio link will not be considered.



Final Notes

We pay fairly, on time, every time. We are looking for long-term tea
mbers who want to grow with us.



Thank you
salary: Rate based on experience and portfolio

title: Inbound Sales & Lead Coordinator (US Cleaning Company | Phone + Follow-Up | Full-Time)
description:
We are a growing residential cleaning company in the United States looking for a high-performing Lead Coordinator to handle inbound inquiries, follow up with potential clients, and help convert leads into recurring customers.



This is a sales-focused role. Your primary responsibility is to respond quickly, communicate clearly, and consistently follow up until the customer books service.



You will be speaking directly with U.S.-based customers, so clear, neutral English communication is required.



Key Responsibilities:

-Answer inbound calls from new customer inquiries

-Respond to web leads within 2–5 minutes (text,
, phone)

-Schedule estimates for potential clients

-Perform structured follow-up on all unconverted leads

-Maintain accurate notes in our CRM system

-Use scripts and follow processes to guide conversations



What Success Looks Like (KPIs)

You will be measured on:

-Speed to Lead: Response time under 5 minutes

-Booking Rate: % of inquiries scheduled for estimates

-Follow-Up Completion: 100% of leads followed up consistently

-Conversion Rate: Estimates converted into recurring customers



This is a performance-driven role. High performers will earn more and grow quickly.



Requirements

-Excellent spoken English with neutral or minimal accent

-Confident and natural on phone calls with U.S. customers

-Sales mindset (comfortable guiding customers to a decision)

-Strong follow-up discipline (you do not “drop” leads)

-Reliable internet and quiet work environment

-Ability to work U.S. business hours (CST)



Compensation

-$3–$6/hour (based on experience)



Performance bonuses for:

-Booked estimates

-Converted recurring clients



Why Join Us

-Long-term, stable position

-Clear expectations and structured systems

-Opportunity to grow into senior sales role

-Direct impact on company growth



Application Instructions (IMPORTANT)

To apply, please include:

-A short audio recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself

-A sample response to this scenario:

---“A customer is interested but says they want to think about it. What would you say?”

-Your internet speed test result



Applications without these will not be reviewed.

title: TikTok Live Sales Closer (Face of SurviveX) – High Commission + Base
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines) 

Work Hours: US Evenings (EST/PST – Morning/Midday PH Time) 

Budget: $400 USD Base + 20% Commission (e.g $18+ per sale of $90+)



Who We Are: 

SurviveX is a US-based survival and first-aid brand. We don't just sell gear; we sell peace of mind. We are looking for a charismatic, high-energy, and persuasive Live Host to be the face of our brand on TikTok. This is not a "VA" job—this is a Sales Closer role for someone who loves the rush of a live audience.



The Opportunity: Base plus Commission

We are a bootstrap startup, which means we win when you win.



Base Retainer: $400 USD/month to cover your dedicated time and setup.

Massive Upside: $18 USD commission for every unit sold during your Lives (Average price: $90).

The Math: Sell just 10 units a week, and you’re making $1,120 USD/month. 

Sell 20 units a week, and you're at $1,840 USD/month—placing you in the top 1% of earners in the PH.



Who You Are:



Master Communicator: Your English is flawless, energetic, and relatable to a US audience.

Natural Closer: You know how to handle "objection handling" in real-time. You don't just read a script; you build a "must-have" vibe.



Tech Savvy: You have a high-quality smartphone (iPhone 13+ preferred) and a stable, high-speed fiber connection.

Resilient: You are comfortable being on camera for 2-3 hours at a time, keeping the energy high even if the room is quiet.

Bonus: You have an interest in survival gear, camping, or first aid (or you’re a fast learner).



Responsibilities:



Host five TikTok Lives per week focused on the US market.

Run "Flash Sales" and engage with US viewers to drive immediate conversions.

Collaborate with our team to refine the "pitch" based on live feedback.

Our team will help you with all backend operations during the sale, all you need to do is bring BIG emergency and sell, sell, sell.



How to Apply:



Do not send a resume yet. Please send a 60-second video introducing yourself..



The Challenge: Pick up any household object (a pen, a mug, a flashlight) and sell it to us as if it were a survival tool. Show us your energy!



#Tiktok #TiktokShop #CustomerSupport #CustomerService #VirtualAssistant #TiktokShopSupport #TiktokShopManager #TiktokShopLive #TiktokLiveHost

title: TikTok Shop & Affiliate Manager (Full-Time Remote, US Hours)
description:
Location: Remote (Must work US Eastern Time hours: 9 AM - 5 PM EST, Monday-Friday)



Compensation: $1,000 - $1,500 per month (based on experience and performance)



Experience Level: Intermediate (1-2 years in affiliate marketing, social media management, or e-commerce preferred)



About Us:

We're a growing e-commerce brand specializing in survival and first-aid products, like our innovative Burn MOD hydrogel dressings. We sell via TikTok Shop and are expanding into Amazon affiliates and website traffic through Refersion. Our affiliate program is thriving with top creators in the prepper, wellness, and outdoor niches. We're looking for a proactive manager to scale this—someone who can spot talent, build relationships, and drive GMV through creative campaigns and competitions.



What You'll Do:

As our TikTok Shop & Affiliate Manager, you'll own the end-to-end affiliate ecosystem. This starts with a 3-month onboarding phase where you'll shadow me closely, learning our processes, tools, and strategies. After that, you'll run the program independently with my ongoing guidance. Key responsibilities include:



Vetting & Onboarding Affiliates: 

Review applications for free product samples on TikTok Shop. Assess audience fit, content quality, and performance history to approve the best creators.



Communications Management: 

Handle outreach and updates via Euka (our
 tool). Set up global messages, segment lists (e.g., by niche or performance tier), and nurture relationships to keep affiliates engaged.



Negotiations & Retainers: 

Identify high-potential creators and negotiate monthly retainers ($300-$1,500) in exchange for 8-12 videos per month, plus commissions on sales. Draft offers, track deliverables, and optimize for ROI.



Community & Competitions: 

Manage our 
 server for 50+ affiliates. Run monthly contests rewarding top video posters and GMV generators with prizes. Use tools like Refunnel to track submissions, attribute sales, and create leaderboards.



Expansion Support: 

Help transition affiliates to Amazon attribution and Refersion for website traffic, ensuring seamless multi-channel growth.



Performance Tracking: 

Monitor GMV, engagement, and ROI using TikTok analytics, Google Sheets, and affiliate dashboards. Report weekly insights to optimize campaigns.



You'll report directly to me (the founder) and collaborate with our small remote team. Expect a dynamic role with room to innovate—great ideas get rewarded!

What We're Looking For



Skills & Experience:



*Proven track record in affiliate marketing, influencer management, or social e-commerce (TikTok Shop experience a huge plus).

*Comfortable with tools like Euka 
 automation), 
 (community mod), Refunnel (UGC tracking), Canva (content briefs), and Google Sheets (reporting).

*Strong negotiation skills for retainers and partnerships; bonus if you've managed paid creator programs.

*Excellent English communication—written and verbal—for
s, DMs, and 
 interactions.

*Analytical mindset: Comfortable with metrics like GMV, engagement rates, and ROI.





*Personal Traits: Organized, proactive, and creative. You're a people person who thrives in fast-paced remote work and loves spotting viral potential in creator content.



Requirements:



Full-time availability during US EST hours (flexible within that window).

Reliable high-speed internet and quiet workspace.

Based in the Philippines (preferred for time zone alignment and platform familiarity).

Available to start immediately after a quick paid test task.





How to Apply

If this sounds like your next challenge, apply now! Tell us in your cover letter: "What's one affiliate campaign you've run that drove real sales, and why?" 



We're excited to build something big together.

title: Fitness DM Setter & VA for Online Coaching Brand
description:
Established online fitness coaching brand hiring an experienced DM setter and VA to manage Instagram conversations, qualify leads, and book discovery calls.

Previous experience with fitness or coaching brands is a must.



We are not looking for a yes-person. 

Prospects come into the DMs with strong opinions and common misconceptions about fat loss, training, and nutrition. You need the knowledge to gently challenge them, hold positioning, and guide conversations toward booked calls.



AI assistance is fine. Sounding generic is not. Your knowledge, voice, and personality must come through.

- GHL management
