3. How do you stand out from other VAs?



4. How would you reply to this DM?

"My maintenance cals I think are different to what they were. I've lost some weight and noticed I've been eating my maintenance cals. I want my delts to pop and my stomach to be flatter, I like eating maintenance but I still want to keep losing from here."



5. A prospect tells you "eating after 6pm makes you gain fat." How would you respond?



Generic or AI-only answers will not be considered.

title: Senior Medical Virtual Assistant
description:
Auxo Health

Senior Medical Virtual Assistant

---

Role Summary

The Senior Medical Virtual Assistant (VA) provides high-level remote support to physicians across clinical, administrative, and coordination workflows. This role requires strong medical knowledge, operational ownership, and the ability to function independently in fast-paced, high-responsibility environments. The VA acts as an extension of the physician, ensuring efficiency, organization, and continuity of care.

---

Core Responsibilities

I. Clinical & Administrative Support

- Assist with clinical documentation and EMR/EHR workflows

- Prepare and organize information for patient care and follow-ups

- Support coordination across inpatient, outpatient, and procedural settings



II. Care Coordination

- Track referrals, imaging, procedures, and follow-ups

- Ensure no gaps in patient care or communication

- Coordinate with patients, clinics, hospitals, and care teams



III. Inbox & Calendar Management

- Manage physician's inbox to reduce overload

- Coordinate scheduling and prevent conflicts

- Protect physician time and workflow efficiency



IV. Patient Communication

- Communicate clearly and professionally with patients

- Provide instructions, reminders, and follow-ups

- Maintain empathy while staying within non-clinical boundaries



V. Operational Support

- Identify inefficiencies and improve workflows

- Adapt to changing schedules and physician needs

- Support additional initiatives when required (e.g., leadership, education, projects)

---

Required Qualifications

- Nursing graduate (required)

- Familiarity with U.S. healthcare systems and workflows

- Experience in healthcare coordination or clinical environments

- EMR/EHR experience preferred

- Strong written and verbal English communication skills

---

Core Competencies

I. Work Ethic & Ownership

- Highly reliable and accountable

- Able to manage time-sensitive tasks consistently

- Operates independently with minimal supervision



II. Clinical Awareness

- Understands patient care workflows and medical terminology

- Able to anticipate risks and gaps in coordination



III. Communication & Emotional Intelligence

- Clear, professional, and empathetic communication

- Maintains composure under pressure



IV. Organization & Prioritization

- Strong systems thinking

- Able to manage competing priorities effectively

- Detail-oriented with high follow-through

---

Ideal Candidate Traits

- Proactive and anticipatory

- Calm, steady, and emotionally resilient

- Respectful of traditional medical environments and hierarchy

- Patient-centered but not emotionally overextended

- Comfortable working with high-performing, busy physicians

---

Work Setup

- Full-time, dedicated to one physician

- Remote (PH or SA preferred)

- Flexible schedule aligned with physician workflow (may include early mornings or ICU support)

---

Positioning

This is a high-trust, high-responsibility role, designed for candidates who want to build long-term careers supporting physicians in specialized medical environments—not general VA work.

---

How to Apply:



Please send the following to 
 with the subject line:

“Senior Medical VA – [Your Full Name]”



Include:

1. Updated resume (PDF format)

2. A short introduction



Note: We prefer applications via
/form due to our structured screening process.

I’m looking for a consistent video editor to turn my streams into engaging 10–15 minute YouTube videos for my Roblox content channel (Samiiny).



This is a long-term opportunity if the quality is strong.



What You’ll Do

Take full stream recordings and turn them into:

1-3 polished 10–15 minute YouTube video

Identify and extract:

Best moments

Funny clips

Engaging gameplay moments

Edit the video to match modern Roblox YouTube style



Editing Style (IMPORTANT)

Your editing should match current successful Roblox creators:

Fast-paced, high retention

Clean cuts (no boring downtime)

Zoom-ins, sound effects, captions when needed

Memes/reactions only when they add value

Keep it entertaining but not overedited



Think:

Engaging storytelling

Clear progression (not random clips)

Viewer should NOT get bored



Thumbnail Creation

You will also:

Create 1-3 high-quality YouTube thumbnail per video

Style should match current Roblox YouTube meta

Bright, high contrast

Clear focal point (face/game moment)

Simple, clickable idea

You can reference and replicate styles from top creators



Expectations

Understand YouTube retention

Deliver content that keeps viewers watching

Be able to study other Roblox creators and adapt

Open to feedback and improving over time

Consistent delivery



Looking For Individuals (Not Required But Nice to Have):

Experience editing gaming or Roblox content

Strong sense of pacing and timing

Ability to create thumbnails (Photoshop/Canva/etc.)

Understand YouTube trends/meta

Reliable communication

Experience with viral YouTube content

Understanding of hooks (first 5–10 seconds)

Ideas on improving videos over time



To Apply

Send:

Portfolio or past work (YouTube videos preferred)

1–2 Roblox videos you’ve edited (or similar style)

Your rate per video



Goal

Build a high-performing Roblox channel with consistent, engaging uploads.

title: 24 hr interview invite if selected for VA Receptionist | Fast Hire | Read Before Applying
description:
Important: Our application process moves very quickly. If you are selected for the next rounds of interviews, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist. This role consists of handling inbound calls, booking appointments, and completing various administrative tasks. This is a long-term, performance-based position. All calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



For candidates who may be a stronger fit outside of a voice-based role, we also offer non-voice positions with a heavier focus on administrative tasks, subject to availability and overall fit.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them in your reply, and answer each one thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?

(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: E-commerce Accountant & Systems Specialist (Full-Time)
description:
PLEASE READ CAREFULLY. 

You need to be available 8am - 5pm US Central Time Mon - Fri

You will be working full time with us and managing day to day accounting related task.

Please send your CV.



Role Overview:



We are seeking a detail-oriented, technically proficient Accountant to

manage the financial operations of our high-volume USA-based e-commerce (95%) and

wholesale (5%) business. This is a full-time remote position where you will be

responsible for ensuring the integrity of our financial data across multiple platforms,

specifically Sellercloud and QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise. (If you are unfamiliar

with Sellercloud, we will provide training. It is an Order management website we

use for our business.)



Key Responsibilities:



-System Synchronization: Manage the daily data export from Sellercloud to

QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise via Quickbridge. Proactively identify and

resolve sync errors, mapping issues, and SKU discrepancies.



-Payout Reconciliation: Perform complex reconciliations of settlements from

various payment gateways (Amazon, eBay, etc.). Ensure that gross sales,

platform fees, and net deposits are accurately recorded.



-Inventory Audit: Regularly audit and reconcile QuickBooks Enterprise data

against Sellercloud records to ensure a single "source of truth" for inventory and

financial health.



-Wholesale Management: Oversee the 5% wholesale portion of the business,

including invoicing, billing, and managing accounts receivable (AR).



-Cash Flow & Daily Operations: Maintain accurate records of daily payables

and receivables. Monitor cash flow and provide regular reporting to management.



-Data Integrity: Ensure that all financial records are audit-ready and reflect the

true operational status of the business.



Technical Requirements:



-Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise.

-Direct experience with ERP software like Netsuite, SellerCloud, Linnworks,

Skubana, Zoho etc.

-Strong understanding of e-commerce payment reconciliation workflows.

-Ability to work via remote desktop access to a local PC.

-Advanced Excel skills for data analysis and troubleshooting.



Required Experience:



-3+ years of professional accounting experience, with a heavy focus on

Inventory-based businesses.



-Deep Technical Knowledge of QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise (must

understand Advanced Inventory and Bank Feeds).



-E-commerce Specialist: Proven track record reconciling high-volume

settlements from Amazon, eBay, and Walmart.



-Systems Proficiency: Experience managing data flows between an ERP (like

Sellercloud) and accounting software.



-Cash Flow Management: Ability to produce weekly cash flow forecasts, not just

monthly balance sheets.

title: Sales Closer | Lead Follow-Up | CRM, Retention
description:
DESCRIPTION:

We're a fast-growing Canadian online dealership specializing in professional cleaning equipment. We help entrepreneurs and cleaning businesses across Canada get the right machines to grow their operations — and we're looking for a driven Virtual Assistant to help us close more sales, retain leads, and keep our CRM running smoothly.



What You'll Be Doing:



Following up with warm leads and inbound inquiries via phone, email and live chat

Closing sales conversations by understanding customer needs and recommending the right equipment

Managing and updating our CRM — logging calls, tracking lead stages, and ensuring no opportunity falls through the cracks

Nurturing prospects who didn't buy on first contact through consistent, professional follow-up

Re-engaging cold leads with timely outreach

Coordinating with ownership on pipeline status and flagging high-priority opportunities

Responding to customer questions about products, shipping, warranty, financing, returns, and more



What We're Looking For:



Fluent English — spoken and written, neutral accent required for phone calls

Availability during EST business hours: Monday - Saturday, 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM

Proven experience in sales, customer service, or a closing role (cleaning industry experience is a bonus, not required)

Comfortable on the phone — you don't shy away from outbound calls

Experience using a CRM platform

Highly organized, self-motivated, and reliable — you follow up without being told twice

Ability to quickly learn product knowledge (we'll train you on our equipment lineup)

Stable internet connection and a quiet, professional environment for calls



Nice to Have:



Experience working with e-commerce or dropshipping stores

Familiarity with Shopify

Background in B2B sales or selling to small business owners

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant
description:
Hi, my name is Cameron. I’m a real estate agent based in Florida, and I run a fast-paced, growing business. I’m looking to hire a part time Real Estate Virtual Assistant who is highly organized, detail-oriented, and dependable. This is a long-term role with room to grow.



Introduction Video -  



You’ll be helping manage the backend of my business so I can stay focused on clients and growth. If you’re someone who takes initiative, thrives with structure, and enjoys supporting a team behind the scenes, this could be a great fit for you.



Communication Expectations

I value open and efficient communication. You can reach me via
, text, call, or WhatsApp, whichever is most convenient. I would like to receive a weekly
 update every Monday to review the previous week’s accomplishments and activities. Additionally, we will meet for 15-20 minutes every Monday to review your prior weeks performance, answer any questions and discuss upcoming tasks and priorities.



Working Hours

It is important that work is conducted during business hours (9AM - 5PM Eastern Time M-F) to ensure alignment with client and business needs.



Our Values and Mission

Integrity, honesty, professionalism, problem-solving, knowledge, and a commitment to excellence are the values that drive this business. Our mission is to provide exceptional real estate services that address the unique needs and concerns of each client, ensuring smooth and successful transactions through professionalism, responsiveness, and strong advocacy.



At the same time, we believe in taking care of each other as much as we care for our clients. This business represents three years of dedication, hard work, and passion, and your role will be instrumental in helping us continue to deliver exceptional service and grow to new heights.





Core Responsibilities

This role includes, but is not limited to:



Data Entry 



Sending weekly seller updates and collecting showing feedback

 

Scheduling and coordinating open houses



Marketing & Content Support



Managing Instagram,
, and YouTube uploads

Creating Canva flyers using provided templates



Clipping short-form videos from long-form content (training provided)



Ordering marketing materials, closing gifts, and print items



Calendar & Communication Management



Maintaining clean records and tracking communications



Admin & Back-End Support



Paying invoices and organizing receipts



Assisting with QuickBooks (training available if needed)



Organizing digital files and documents (Google Drive, AppFiles)



Supporting automation setup via Zapier and system improvement



Tools You'll Be Using

Follow Up Boss (CRM)



Canva



QuickBooks



Google Workspace (Drive, Docs, Sheets, Calendar)



Asana



Slack



Zoom



Loom



Vulcan7, Fello, Constant Contact



ShowingTime



Screenshot Monitor



RPR & Florida MLS systems



What I'm Looking For

Strong written and verbal English communication



1+ year experience as a VA or administrative assistant (real estate is a plus)



Proficiency with tools like Canva, Google Suite, and Slack



Attention-to-detail, Highly organized, reliable, and proactive



Ability to problem-solve independently and meet deadlines



Comfortable working during U.S. business hours



Coachable and committed to long-term growth



Bonus If You Have Experience With

MLS input (especially in Florida markets)



Real estate marketing



Zapier or workflow automation



QuickBooks or expense tracking



How to Apply



If this sounds like a good fit, please complete the application using the link provided. Please specifically mention this is for the Florida Real Estate VA Position. We will only review applicants who follow all instructions and complete the full form. Selected applicants may be asked to complete a short paid trial task and a Zoom interview.







This is a long-term role with growth potential. I’m excited to meet the right person and build a successful working relationship together.

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Head of Growth & Marketing Systems Architect (Home Services)

We are building a dominant home service brand and are looking for a Head of Growth to lead, align, and scale our entire marketing operation.

Strategy

Performance tracking

Revenue growth

Cost per lead

Channel performance

Monthly

4. Systems & Automation

Inside GoHighLevel:

Build and optimize follow-up systems (SMS,
)

Implement review generation systems

5. Growth Architecture

???? WHO YOU ARE

2. Funnel Understanding

Traffic ? Leads ? Booked Jobs ? Revenue

Where do most businesses fail?

3. Team Alignment

4. Performance Metrics

Daily

Weekly

Monthly

And why?

5. Agency Experience

What types of clients?

What problems did you solve?

6. Hiring & Scaling

How do you decide:

When to hire a new specialist?

What role to hire first?

7. First 30 Days

What would your first 30 days look like in this role?



?? FINAL NOTE

We are not looking for someone to “help with marketing.”

We are looking for someone who can:

???? Build

???? Lead

???? Optimize

???? Scale

A complete marketing system.

If you’re a thinker, builder, and operator—we want to hear from you.

title: Account Manager (Part-Time, Remote) – Social Media Marketing Agency
description:
Location: Remote 

Hours: ~18 hours/week to start (with potential to grow)

Schedule: Flexible, but must overlap a few hours with PST (Los Angeles time)



About Us

We’re a Los Angeles-based social media marketing and content agency working with restaurants, food & beverage, and lifestyle brands. We focus on high-quality, engaging content and strategic growth—not just posting for the sake of posting.



We currently manage ~5 retainer clients and are growing.



About the Role

We’re looking for a highly organized, proactive Account Manager to help manage client communication and keep everything running smoothly behind the scenes.



This role is perfect for someone who loves structure, is detail-oriented, and enjoys making sure nothing falls through the cracks.



You will be the bridge between the internal team and clients—helping track deliverables, follow up on tasks, and ensure everything stays on schedule.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Client Communication & Coordination

- Assist with client communication via
 and Slack

- Follow up with clients on pending items, approvals, and assets

- Help prepare agendas and notes for client calls

- Ensure clients feel supported and taken care of



Project & Task Management

- Track deliverables across all client accounts

- Keep internal task boards (Notion, Google Docs, etc.) updated

- Ensure deadlines are met by coordinating with editors/creators

- Flag delays or issues early



Admin & Operations Support

- Help organize files, folders, and content calendars

- Assist with monthly reporting (filling in data where possible)

- Send reminders and keep projects moving forward

- Support light QA (checking captions, posts, etc.)



Who You Are

- Extremely organized and detail-oriented

- Proactive (you don’t wait to be told what to do)

- Strong written English communication skills

- Comfortable managing multiple projects at once

- Reliable and consistent—you follow through

- Calm under pressure and solutions-oriented



Bonus (Not Required, But a Plus)

- Experience working with marketing or social media teams

- Familiarity with tools like Notion, Google Drive, Slack, Canva

- Experience with content calendars or project management

- Understanding of Instagram/TikTok workflows



What Success Looks Like in This Role

- Nothing slips through the cracks

- Clients receive timely responses and follow-ups

- Internal team stays on track with deadlines

- Founder (me) spends less time chasing tasks and more time on strategy



Compensation

- Starting part-time (~20 hours/week)

- Competitive hourly rate based on experience

- Opportunity to grow into a full-time role



How to Apply

- To be considered, please include:

- A short intro about yourself

- Your experience with account management or admin work

- Your favorite productivity or organization tool (and why)

- The word “organized” in the subject line so we know you read this



Final Note

We’re looking for someone long-term who can grow with us. If you’re someone who loves bringing order to chaos and keeping things running smoothly, this could be a great fit.

title: AI-Powered Aviation Radio Trainer (Web App)
description:
The Project

We're building an AI-powered training app for pilots to practice aviation radiotelephony (ATC communication). The app simulates realistic radio conversations between a pilot and air traffic control, using AI for speech synthesis, speech recognition, and real-time evaluation. A first prototype and detailed UI mockups already exist. We need a developer to take this to a polished, launchable MVP.  



What the MVP Does

- Predefined flight scenarios (e.g., departure from uncontrolled airfield, approach to controlled airport, traffic pattern) where the user practices radio calls  

- AI-powered ATC voice that responds realistically to the user's radio calls  

- Speech recognition for the user's input with live transcription on screen  

- AI evaluation – the system checks whether the radio call was correct and gives feedback  

- Map view showing the user's position in the scenario  

- Scoring system per scenario with progress tracking  

- Clean, modern UI – mobile-friendly web app  

- User authentication and basic account management  

- Payment integration (Stripe or similar) for one-time purchase (~60€)  



What's Already Done

- Detailed UI mockups (ready to share)  

- Multiple AI-generated prototype versions (React-based)  

- Clear product vision and feature specs  

- Our founder is a licensed pilot and knows aviation radiotelephony inside out – you'll get precise, domain-expert feedback  



What We're Looking For

- A strong fullstack developer (React + Node/Python backend)  

- Experience with AI/LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, or similar)  

- Experience with Web Speech API or similar speech recognition/synthesis  

- Ability to work independently from a clear spec  

- Good communication in English  

- Available to start within the next 1-2 weeks  



Work Style

- Project-based freelance (invoice, no employment contract)  

- Budget: competitive, based on experience – let's discuss  

- Long-term potential: if this goes well, there are more products to build together  



How to Apply

Send us:

- A brief intro about yourself  

- 1-2 relevant projects you've built (ideally with AI or real-time features)  

- Your hourly/project rate  

- Your availability 



 We'll review and get back to you quickly.

title: Canadian Experienced Senior Operations and Bookkeeping firm Manager
description:
Operations & Bookkeeping Manager (Canadian Clients | Full-Time Remote)

About the Role

We are a growing Canadian bookkeeping firm seeking a high-level, full-time Operations & Bookkeeping Manager to oversee both client work and internal operations.

This is a senior leadership position for someone who is not only an experienced bookkeeper, but also confident in leading a team, improving systems, and acting as the right hand to the business owner.

You will be responsible for ensuring that client files are accurate, deadlines are met, and the team is operating efficiently and continuously improving.

This is not a task-based role. This is an ownership role.

Who This Role Is For

You are:

A senior-level bookkeeper with strong technical expertise

A natural leader who can manage and guide a team

Process-driven and always looking for ways to improve efficiency

Confident communicating with clients in fluent, professional English

Proactive, organized, and capable of running operations independently

Core Responsibilities

Client & Technical Oversight

Review and finalize monthly bookkeeping files

Perform HST reviews and filings (Canada)

Prepare year-end, accountant-ready files

Oversee and support cleanup and catch-up projects

Manage complex workflows including:

E-commerce (Shopify, multi-channel)

Restaurants / POS systems

Clearing accounts and payment processors

Ensure accuracy across reconciliations, AR/AP, and reporting

Team Leadership & Performance Management

Manage and support a team of bookkeepers

Review work, provide feedback, and ensure quality control

Monitor productivity and identify inefficiencies

Proactively identify slow areas and implement solutions to improve speed and accuracy

Coach team members to improve performance

In English (documentation & clarity)

s professionally

Team Culture & Perks

How to Apply

References & Verification

Contact details 
 + phone/WhatsApp)

title: Reddit Manager
description:
Job Title: Reddit Community Engagement Specialist — Wellness & Consciousness Brand (Part-Time, Remote)

Compensation: $2/hour × 3 hours/day | $6/day paid weekly via PayPal or Wise

Hours: 3 hours/day, 5 days/week | Flexible schedule



About The Brand

We are a ceremonial wellness company rooted in the intersection of ancient plant medicine traditions, modern neuroscience, and consciousness exploration. Our products and content live at the crossroads of sacred cacao, botanical blends, and the science of sub-perceptual cognitive enhancement. We are fully compliant and operate within federal guidelines.

Our community includes seekers, researchers, meditators, biohackers, therapists, and anyone curious about expanding human potential through plant-based ceremony and intentional living.



About The Role

We need a genuine Reddit community member — not a marketer — who already lives and breathes this world. Someone who reads about psychedelic science for fun. Someone who knows the difference between Terence McKenna and Michael Pollan. Someone who can discuss the history of psilocybin research, the endocannabinoid system, or Amazonian ceremony traditions without Googling first.

This is an educational and community engagement role. You will represent our brand's worldview — not push products. Eighty percent of what you do is genuinely contribute knowledge and perspective to relevant conversations. The remaining twenty percent is naturally and authentically weaving in awareness of our brand when it is genuinely relevant.



What You'll Do Daily



Monitor assigned subreddits in the psychedelic, wellness, neuroscience, and consciousness spaces

Leave thoughtful, substantive comments that demonstrate real knowledge

Share relevant science, history, and cultural context around plant medicine and ceremonial traditions

Post occasional questions that spark genuine community discussion

Write in a natural, conversational voice — never corporate, never salesy

Submit a daily log of every interaction with links and 24-hour engagement numbers

Follow our detailed brand voice guide on every post — no improvising on sensitive topics





Target Community Areas

You will be engaging in communities around:



Psychedelic science and research

Microdosing protocols and experiences

Plant medicine ceremony and integration

Neuroscience and cognitive enhancement

Consciousness exploration and meditation

Ceremonial cacao and botanical wellness

Ancient history of entheogenic traditions





Requirements



Active Reddit account with 500+ karma — must share username in application

Genuine personal interest in psychedelics, plant medicine, or consciousness research — this is not negotiable

Excellent written English — coherent, nuanced, and intellectually credible

Ability to discuss the science and history of psilocybin, ceremonial traditions, and botanical medicine with authority

Deep understanding of Reddit culture — you know which communities have which rules and why

Consistent daily availability and self-directed work ethic

Meticulous about submitting daily logs without being reminded





You Are The Right Person If You



Already follow researchers like Robin Carhart-Harris, Matthew Johnson, or Michael Pollan

Have personal experience with plant medicine ceremony or microdosing protocols

Can write about the history of entheogenic use across cultures — Mazatec, Amazonian, Eleusinian — naturally and accurately

Understand the difference between recreational use and intentional ceremonial practice

Know how to add genuine value to a Reddit thread without anyone suspecting you have any agenda

Care about destigmatizing plant medicine through education not hype





You Are Not The Right Person If You



Have never personally explored this space

Write in corporate or promotional language

Cannot commit to 3 hours every weekday

Are looking for a shortcut or automation opportunity

Would need to Google basic terms like "set and setting" or "integration"





How To Apply

Send a message with all four of the following — incomplete applications will not be reviewed:



Your Reddit username — we will review your comment history

A short paragraph about your personal relationship with plant medicine, consciousness exploration, or ceremonial wellness

A sample comment you would leave on a Reddit post titled "Has anyone found natural ways to improve focus and clarity long-term?" — write it exactly as you would actually post it, in your natural voice

Your timezone and daily availability window

title: Events Coordinator - Hockey Brand
description:
About Us 

Titan BattleGear is an American hockey protective equipment brand making the most protective base layers / neck guards on the ice. We outfit players from youth leagues all the way to the NHL level, and we're growing fast. We attend and sponsor hockey industry events across North America and need a sharp, organized, trustworthy person to help us manage the details behind the scenes.



The Role 

We're looking for a part-time remote Events Coordinator on a contract basis through the end of summer 2026, with strong potential to continue if things go well. You'll work approximately 5–10 hours per week, with some weeks lighter and others busier as events approach. This is a great fit for someone who is organized, self-directed, and wants to grow with a brand long-term.



What You'll Do

- Build and manage event task lists, timelines, and checklists in Asana

- Research event details, exhibitor requirements, and logistics

- Coordinate shipping of booth materials, product samples, and branded items

- Manage vendor orders – print, swag, signage, apparel – and track deadlines

- Handle expense tracking and manage purchases on a company card responsibly

- Maintain a master events calendar and keep the team updated on deadlines

- Compile attendee and contact lists for pre- and post-event outreach

- Coordinate hotel, flight, and ground transportation bookings for the team

- Assist with special event projects (custom printed materials, gift coordination, surprise-and-delight activations)



What We're Looking For

- Proven experience coordinating events – trade shows, conferences, or sponsorships (please share examples in your application)

- Excellent written and spoken English – you will communicate directly with our team and vendors regularly

- Extremely organized, detail-oriented, and deadline-driven

- Trustworthy and reliable – this role involves managing orders and expenses on a company card

- Proactive – you catch things before they become problems

- Genuinely interested in American hockey and willing to learn the industry quickly

- Availability during US business hours for communication and check-ins

- Experience with Asana, Google Sheets, and Gmail preferred



What We Offer

- Part-time, fully remote contract role (~5-20 hours/week, depending on when the events are)

- Competitive hourly rate based on experience

- Real potential to transition into an ongoing role as we grow our events program

- A front-row seat to the hockey industry – including NHL-level events and conferences



How to Apply 

Please apply with:

1. Your resume

2. A short description of past events you coordinated – what they were, what you managed, and what the outcomes were

3. A voice or video recording introducing yourself (Loom is fine) so we can hear your English fluency firsthand

4. Your expected hourly rate in USD

title: B2B Sales Development Rep (SDR)
description:
About This Role:

We are a North American agency that builds custom AI automation for service businesses. We answer every call, book every appointment, and handle follow-ups — 24/7. Our clients are med spas, HVAC companies, plumbers, roofers, and other service businesses across the US and Canada.

We are hiring outbound Sales Development Representatives (SDRs) to cold call business owners in the United States, qualify them, and book discovery calls for our founder to close. This is a high-activity outbound role — you will be dialing, talking to decision makers, and booking appointments every day.

This is not a customer service role. This is not lead research. This is cold calling. If you are great on the phone and can handle rejection while staying professional and persistent, read on.



What You Will Do

• Make 80–100 outbound cold calls per day to US business owners using a provided lead list

• Introduce our agency, qualify the prospect, and book a 20-minute discovery call with our founder

• Overcome objections professionally and follow a provided call script

• Log every call outcome accurately in a shared Google Sheet

• Attend a short daily check-in and flag blockers or questions

• Improve your pitch based on feedback from recorded call reviews



What You Will NOT Do

• You will NOT close deals yourself — your only job is to book a qualified call

• You will NOT research leads — we provide the contact list

• You will NOT do any admin, customer support, or account management



Compensation Structure

We offer a low base salary plus performance bonuses. The more you book and help close, the more you earn. Top performers will consistently earn above market rate.



Base Salary

• $300–$400 USD per month (based on experience and voice recording assessment)



Performance Bonuses

• $10 USD per qualified discovery call that shows up (prospect attends the call)

• $20 USD for every deal that closes — paid when setup fee is collected

• $30 USD bonus if YOU personally close the deal on your own call (for exceptional SDRs who develop into closers)



Example monthly earnings at solid performance:

• 20 showed calls = $200 in booking bonuses

• 6 closed deals = $120 in close bonuses

• Base = $350

• Total = approximately $670 USD for the month



Example monthly earnings at strong performance:

• 40 showed calls = $400 in booking bonuses

• 12 closed deals = $240 in close bonuses

• Base = $400

• Total = approximately $1,040 USD for the month



Example monthly earnings at top performance:

• 60 showed calls = $600 in booking bonuses

• 18 closed deals = $360 in close bonuses

• Base = $400

• Total = approximately $1,360 USD for the month



Payments are made bi-weekly via Wise or similar. Base is guaranteed. Bonuses are paid when conditions are met (showed call, collected payment).



Requirements

• Strong spoken English with a clear, professional accent — accent does not need to be American but must be easily understood by US business owners

• Previous outbound cold calling experience, ideally B2B

• Comfortable with rejection and able to make 80+ calls per day without losing energy

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet work environment

• Available during US business hours (Eastern or Central time preferred)

• Honest and accurate in logging call outcomes — we verify using call recordings

• Able to follow a script while still sounding natural and human



Nice to Have

• Experience selling SaaS, software, or technology services

• Experience calling service businesses (healthcare, trades, hospitality)

• Familiarity with AI tools or automation products

• Prior experience using Apollo.io, JustCall, or similar outbound tools



Tools We Provide

• Curated lead list with verified US business owner contact details (via Apollo.io)

• JustCall account with a US phone number — all calls made and recorded through this system

• Call script, objection handling guide, and product training

• Google Sheet for daily call logging

• Access to recorded demo videos to understand the product



How to Apply

To be considered, your application MUST include all three of the following. Applications missing any item will not be reviewed.



1. A short note (3–5 sentences) explaining your outbound cold calling experience

Tell us specifically what you sold, who you called, and roughly how many calls per day you made.



2. Your best month's earnings from a previous commission or bonus role

This tells us you are motivated by performance pay, not just a paycheck.



3. A voice recording of yourself reading the following paragraph out loud

Record yourself reading this text exactly as written. Upload the file or share a link (Google Drive, Dropbox, or any audio file). This is how we assess your spoken English and phone presence.



VOICE RECORDING SCRIPT — read this out loud, exactly as written:

"Hi, this is [your name] calling for Jessica. I'm reaching out from RS — we help med spas and home service businesses like yours make sure every call gets answered, even when your team is busy with clients or on a job. I know you're probably in the middle of your day, so I'll keep this quick. Would you have about 20 minutes this week to see how it works? A lot of owners we speak to say they had no idea how many calls they were losing until they actually looked at the numbers."



Applications that do not include a voice recording will not be considered, regardless of experience.



A Note from the Founder

We are a lean, fast-moving agency. We do not have layers of management or long onboarding programs. You will work directly with me, get real feedback, and see the direct impact of your work. If you close a deal, I will know your name.

I am looking for someone who is hungry, honest, and wants to grow with the company. If you hit the numbers, the compensation grows with you. We are not capping you. The more you produce, the more you earn — and when we scale, the top performers will have first access to better roles, higher bonuses, and more hours.

If that sounds like the kind of environment where you do your best work, I want to hear from you.



- Matt -

title: Real Estate Wholesale Manager
description:
Real Estate Wholesale Manager



Real Estate Transaction Coordinator Virtual Assistant with expertise in Transactions, Compliance, closing processes, administrative support

Responsibilities Ideal Candidate:

Experience closing off market real estate deals, wholesaling, or strong phone sales background

Fluent English 

Strong negotiation skills

Positive attitude, confident energy

Comfortable working independently and remotely

Call  seller leads and buyer leads

Build rapport, confirm motivation, property condition,  asking price and urgency timeline for selling

Negotiate purchase prices and lock up contracts

Update CRM (Google Sheets) daily

Attend quick  check-ins on WhatsApp or zoom as needed

Follow-up with leads as needed

-Appointment Setting

- Call Handling

- Skip Tracing

-
 Management

- Calendar Management

Wholesale Manager to handle cold calling  leads , scheduling appointments, negotiating offers with sellers AND buyers, comping properties,  manage transactions from start to closing.  Start to closing means cold or warm calling leads,  qualifying them, negotiating correctly, delivering signed contracts from bothe sellers and buyers.  That means don't say you can cold call on your profile and not be able to get on the phone and communicate with sellers and buyers.  That means don't say on your profile that you can analyze a property accurately to make an irresistible offer to both buyers and sellers that they cannot decline the offer if you cannot or don't have confidence in your abilities or if you think you will have trouble working independently.   We encourage questions when you don't understand something but we need people who are experienced and require less attention from us to complete the job.

Must calculate ARV (after repair value) ,  MAO ( Maximum Allowable Offer)  accurately enough to present to sellers and buyers to make the deal attractive to buyers and sellers.

Only deal with buyers and sellers who want to close fast  (within 30 days)

Only deal with properties in markets that have a large enough spread to accommodate a seller who is happy and committed to the offer price you make them,  an ARV and MAO calculation that has a large enough wholesale fee and enough profit for a buyer to be happy with the deal.

We need great deals BUT they NEED TO BE ACCURATE deals.  

Acquisition and disposition Manager to  negotiate and closing deals between buyers and sellers.

You will supply your own tools and leads from sources you feel comfortable using.

Propstream, Propwire, XLeads, Batchleads, etc.,.  where ever.

You will contact sellers and buyers from markets that are easiest for you to close with best margins. We can discuss this.  If you have experience in this I won't need to elaborate on specific markets.



1 deal = 1 signed seller contract combined with 1 signed buyer contract who is committed to that property. Along with the seller and buyer contracts you will also submit a report of all sold properties, property details, photos (where applicable), comparable properties and all documents associated with each property. 

After you are done with the contracts they will be sent to the title company who takes over the process.

The more successful deals you can bring to the organization the more valuable you will be.  Can you deliver 3-5 deals per month ? 5-10 deals per month ?   More ? Let's discuss.  You don't  have to appear on camera on the zoom or WhatsApp but you do need to speak clear and concise English and communicate effectively with us and the buyers and sellers  you'll be dealing with. 

You need to be goal oriented and to make certain commitments to submit enough deals monthly to consistently improve.

$3-$10/ HR depending on productivity requirements and experience   480-1600/mo range

8 hr/day M-F FT

Please be experienced and do not rely on our limited training.

All contacted applicants will be notified for an introductory zoom call or WhatsApp to communicate with each other and confirm understanding of each other's responsibilities before beginning any work.  You will be required to sign off on a terms and conditions agreement that we both need to agree to and submit to escrow company to protect us both.  This ensures that you get paid for your work and we get our documentation and payments.

You will be paid through escrow service to start.    This will not cost you anything but they will need your banking information to send payment directly to you.

The payment does not get released to you, the worker, until the title company signs off on a clear title from the seller's property and the buyer is moving forward with the purchase for all deals that you commit to or each deal you successfully complete.  Whatever we agree to. 

This process usually takes less than 7 days for each deal.

Any applicants who ask for payment up front before any work is done to pay for any tools or anything they need to begin working will be automatically disqualified.

These are the terms for the responsibilities.  We encourage all qualified applicants to apply but Please do not apply if you disagree with any of these terms.

title: Full-Time Creative Content & Growth Operator
description:
Full-Time Creative Content & Growth Operator  

(Post Daily • Build a Brand • Help Scale a Real Business)



This is not a typical marketing job.



You’ll be working directly with me to grow a real company using content, video, and creative execution.



I’m not looking for someone to “manage social media.”



I’m looking for someone who:

-is creative  

-moves fast  

- can produce content at volume  

-and wants to help build something that actually scales  



---



 What You’ll Be Doing



- Posting content multiple times per day across platforms (TikTok, Reels, Shorts, etc.)

- Taking our raw content and turning it into high-performing videos

- Repurposing one piece of content into multiple formats

- Testing content, angles, and ideas to see what works

- Working directly with me to figure out what’s hitting and what’s not

- Helping refine messaging, hooks, and creative direction

- Supporting basic ad creative testing (what content performs, what doesn’t)



---



Training & Content Systems (Important)



You will also help take our internal content and turn it into something valuable for clients:



- Edit training videos from Zoom calls and recordings  

- Break them into clean, structured lessons  

- Organize them into a simple, easy-to-follow training library  

- Help build a resource center clients can actually use  



This is about turning raw knowledge into something structured and scalable.



---



Why This Role Is Different



You won’t be:

- Stuck doing repetitive VA work  

- Waiting all day for instructions  

- Just “posting content”  



You WILL be:

- Creating content that actually drives leads  

- Working directly with the founder  

- Testing ideas and seeing real results  

- Helping build both the front-end (content) and backend (training systems) of the business  



---



 What I’m Looking For



- You are highly creative and can come up with ideas quickly  

- You can edit videos FAST and make them engaging  

- You understand hooks, pacing, captions, and attention  

- You’re comfortable posting multiple times per day  

- You don’t overthink — you execute and adjust  

- You want a full-time, long-term role  



---

Bonus (not required, but strong advantage)



- Experience with CapCut, Premiere, or similar  

- Understanding of TikTok / Reels / Shorts growth  

- Basic knowledge of marketing or ads  

- Experience organizing content or training materials  



---



Compensation



- $8/hour (40 hours/week)  

- Weekly pay  

- Performance bonuses based on results  



---



How to Apply



Keep it simple:



1. A quick message about why you’re a good fit  

2. 2–3 examples of videos/content you’ve edited or created  

3. A short Loom video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself  



---

Read This Before Applying



This is a fast-paced role.



If you:

- work slowly  

- need constant direction  

- or overcomplicate things  



this won’t be a good fit.



If you:

move fast  

create consistently 

and want to help build something real  



apply now.

title: Research Assistant
description:
JOB OPPORTUNITY: RESEARCH & PERSONAL ASSISTANT TO DOCTORAL RESEARCHER



PROJECT CONTEXT: Supporting a doctoral thesis and ongoing research papers focused on Latin American macroeconomics, currency stabilization, dollarization, and global geopolitical influences.



THE OPPORTUNITY: This role offers deep exposure to high-level academic research. For a high-performing assistant, I am committed to providing formal letters of recommendation and acknowledgment in published work.



THE NATURE OF THE ROLE: This is a remote, part-time, and STRICTLY TRANSACTIONAL position. It is a dual-function role requiring high-level academic support and assistance with personal administrative logistics. It is designed for a professional who prefers a high-accountability environment.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



ACADEMIC VERIFICATION: Audit and correct citations to ensure 100% compliance with APA 7th edition standards.



RESEARCH PAPER SUPPORT: Support for ongoing research papers and current projects; this includes managing drafts and ensuring data consistency.



DATA RETRIEVAL: Gather economic data and pricing indices from retail and government websites across Latin America and the USA.



PERSONAL & ADMINISTRATIVE SUPPORT: Assist with non-academic logistics (travel research, scheduling, household-related tasks).



REQUIRED SKILLS & LANGUAGES



ENGLISH: Must have C1/C2 professional fluency (written and spoken).



SPANISH (A MAJOR PLUS): Functional reading proficiency is highly preferred for navigating foreign-language websites.



COMMUNICATION & CONNECTIVITY (STRICT REQUIREMENTS)



REDUNDANT INTERNET: You must have a stable Wi-Fi connection AND a mobile phone with a consistent data plan for emergency hotspots.



AVAILABILITY: You must be contactable and responsive during the EVENING HOURS in the Philippines (Daylight hours in Ecuador, GMT-5).



HIGH-ACCOUNTABILITY & EFFICIENCY STANDARDS



EFFICIENCY AUDITS: I monitor output density. I have established "benchmark times" for most tasks. If your logged time consistently exceeds these benchmarks without a valid technical explanation, those hours will be audited and potentially rejected.



THE CLOCK IS THE CLOCK: Time-tracking software (with active window monitoring) is the sole authority for compensation. The clock MUST be stopped for all personal breaks, social media, or non-work messaging.



ZERO HALLUCINATION POLICY: Providing a "fact" or citation not verified by a primary source is considered a failure of the task.



COMPENSATION & BILLING



PERFORMANCE-BASED GROWTH: This position begins with a 90-day trial period. A formal review will occur after 90 days of proven commitment and high-integrity work, with the potential for a rate increase.



WEEKLY POST-PAYMENT: Compensation is processed WEEKLY, exclusively for work completed and verified via logs.



NO ADVANCES OR RETAINERS: I do not provide pre-payments, cash advances, or loans under any circumstances.



EBB AND FLOW WORKLOAD: There will be weeks with ZERO WORK AVAILABLE. Payment is strictly for recorded, approved minutes worked.



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS



MANAGED AI TOOLS: Proficiency in Gemini Pro/Advanced is required. If hired, you will use a project-specific login provided by the Client.



VPN & SECURITY: You must have a reliable VPN (South America/USA) and an up-to-date antivirus suite.



HOW TO APPLY

Please send a brief message including:



DIRECT CONFIRMATION: Explicitly state that you accept the "Weekly Post-Payment" structure, the "No Advances/Loans" policy, the "Efficiency Audit" clause, and the "Redundant Internet" requirements.



INFRASTRUCTURE CHECK: Confirm you have a working VPN, antivirus software, and a mobile data backup plan.



LANGUAGE ABILITY: Briefly describe your level of comfort navigating Spanish-language websites.



CONFLICT DISCLOSURE: List any current academic or work commitments.



NOTE: Applications that appear to be written by AI will be discarded immediately. Successful applicants will be sent a 30-minute technical trial task before an interview is scheduled.

title: Video editor for my Personal Finance YouTube channel
description:
I am looking for a professional to create / edit one YouTube video about personal finance content aimed at the 40+ demographic. 

The length of the video should be between 10-12 minutes long and pay $20 dollar per video.

I would be looking for approximately 3 videos per week, resulting 3 videos per week * 4 weeks * $20 per video = $240 per month.

 

I will provide the script and voice over. (You will not have to do any research regarding the video topic for the video, you will have to find clips/photos/background music/etc to create the video).



The type of video editor I am searching for is to execute a "Financial Noir" aesthetic for an investigative documentary channel. The style must be cinematic and clinical, prioritizing high-contrast "low-key" lighting with deep shadows and a muted navy/gold color palette. I require a deliberate, sophisticated editing pace that avoids "fast-cut" cliches, focusing instead on macro-textures, slow camera drifts, and translucent monospaced HUD overlays. Think Mindhunter meets high-end financial audits—atmospheric, authoritative, and expensive. We value an editor who can interpret this moody, "secret briefing" vibe while maintaining a high standard of visual grit and tension.



I am therefore are looking for someone who:

- Has experience/work in creating YouTube videos

- Has experience using video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro or like software

- Fluent in English

- Able to work within the deadline (24 hours) - including for these samples.

 

The style should adhere to our brand guidelines as per above. This may change across channels.

However, you can be very creative to make the video entertaining and engaging, including the use of AI.



When interested, please provide minimum of 3 videos examples matching to my type of channel.

Please provide links to Google Drive/ Dropbox, NOT any attachments.

 

If you have read until the end of this job description, please type your favorite sport at the beginning or end of your proposal.

title: UK Company Hiring: US Cold Callers
description:
Hiring  Cold callers to Help Build Local Business In the USA

 Base pay $600 per month (after two week training) plus commissions OTE each month $1000-$1500

Company: Start Over Movement Holdings Ltd (Founded by Sir Marco Robinson)

Location: Remote - 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time)

Type: Full-time Independent Contractor

---



The Story Behind Start Over

Sir Marco Robinson is a UK entrepreneur, author, and TV personality who has spent decades helping people rebuild their lives and businesses. He founded Start Over Movement with a simple idea: local business owners should support each other, not compete for the same scraps.



Every Start Over chapter is a community of local business owners who:

Refer clients to each other, generating real revenue

Learn marketing and sales directly from Sir Marco

Get a dedicated commission-only closer assigned to their business

Meet monthly with an exclusive group (only one business per industry per chapter)

It is not networking. It is a referral engine with a mentor attached. Members pay £1,500 (UK) or $1,500 (US and Canada) per year to be part of it. And the model works - we already have active chapters in Laguna Beach, Tampa Bay, New York, London and Toronto. Mississippi is next.

---



Why We Need You



We are looking for 3 cold callers each week to join the team now. We need in total another 180 cold callers within 3 months so this team and the level of recruitment will grow quickly to help launch and fill  up a weekly webinar  the Mississippi chapter. This is part of a broader buildout of 100+ cold callers across all our territories.



The business owners we call are not hostile. They are overwhelmed, under-marketed, and tired of networking groups that do not deliver. When you explain what Start Over actually does - referrals, mentorship, exclusive local representation - the good ones lean in.

closers then to attend a webinar designed to close them for us





The 14-Day Trial

We do not rush this. Your first 14 days are a paid trial:

$15/day base, paid daily via Wise (for verified work days)

Full commission on every sale you close during the trial

Day 1: Onboarding, script training, shadowing, pass the roleplay by end of day

Day 2 onwards: Full production with daily minimums

Live coaching from the Cold Caller Manager throughout

Roleplay check must be passed on Day 1 before going on real calls Day 2

---



What Makes This Role Different

1. You are not hustling a bad offer. Start Over is real. Sir Marco is real. Members are paying, showing up, and referring each other. You are selling something that delivers.



2. You are part of a real team. We are building out 100+ closers across all territories, but we do it properly. You are not one of thousands dialling into a chaotic floor. You get proper coaching, real territory, clear structure, and a Cold Caller Manager who knows your name and your numbers.



3. You have a growth path. Mississippi is the start. As we launch new chapters, top performers get first pick. Build your book with us and grow as we grow.



4. You get real support. Cold Caller Manager in twice-weekly coaching sessions. Direct line to Marco Fernandes (Sales Director, 39 years of sales experience). Proven script refined across thousands of calls. Calendar booking, leads, and territory handed to you.

---



The Daily Reality



Let us be honest about what the day looks like:

9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time) - yes, graveyard

Monday to Friday, five nights a week

300 dials or 120 connects minimum per day from Day 2 (whichever you hit first)

10+ event bookings per day (prospects committed to attend the next Start Over event), OR 1+ direct sale, OR 15+ strong Zoom follow-ups booked

Log every call in real time on the shared tracker

End-of-day report to the Cold Caller Manager

Twice weekly meetings (Tuesdays and Fridays typically)

It is not light work. Cold calling is hard. Graveyard is harder. But it is clear work with clear outcomes, and for the right person it pays better than almost anything else a Filipino remote worker can do.

---



We Are Looking For Someone Who

Must have:

2+ years phone sales or closing experience

OnlineJobs.ph ID Proof 60+ verified on your profile

NBI clearance (or willingness to obtain within 2 weeks of hire)

Strong English, clear accent, professional tone

Real experience closing on the call (not just setting appointments)

Can commit to 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift, Monday to Friday

Own Zoom Pro account

Reliable internet (25+ Mbps - speed test screenshot required with application), quiet space, good headset

Will thrive if you:

Have sold coaching, consulting, BNI, networking memberships, or community products before

Care about what you sell, not just about commission

Take coaching well

Can handle "no" all day without losing energy

Want a long-term role, not a quick gig

---



Honest Caveats

The first chapter in every territory is the hardest. List building, market education, all of it.

Your first week, you may not close. That is normal. Week 2 is where the trial gate lives.

Mississippi is a smaller market than our other chapters. That means you can cover the whole state, but you will also work the list harder.

Overnight shifts are tough. Please do not apply if you cannot genuinely commit to the schedule long-term.

---



Verification and Accountability

We use:

TimeProof (you install on your machine, screenshots and activity tracking)

GoHighLevel / Ringover (dial tracking, call recordings, connect verification)

Shared call tracker (real-time logging)

Random call audits (5+ recorded calls per contractor per day reviewed)

This is not surveillance for its own sake. It is so that:

We know you are working the hours you claim

You are protected if we ever question your output - the data has your back

Coaching can be real, because we can listen to your actual calls

We pay for work verified by these systems. Discrepancies get paid only to the verified level. Clear and fair.

Zero tolerance for fraud: Fabricated connects, mouse jigglers or other activity simulators, fake call logs, or dials to deliberately invalid numbers = immediate termination. Pay for fabricated work will be withheld or clawed back. This is the only thing we are strict about. Real closers never have an issue with this.

---



Termination

Independent contractor. Either party can end the agreement at any time, with or without cause, without notice. We pay for all hours worked and commissions earned up to that point.

---



Group Interview - MONDAY

We are hosting a group interview tomorrow (Monday) at 7pm Manila time (12pm UK, 7am Mississippi).





Zoom link:





 









This is how we meet candidates at scale and make fast decisions. Come ready with:

Webcam and microphone working

Professional background and attire

Ready to do a short live roleplay on a cold call

Questions about the role

If you cannot attend live, send your application anyway and we will include you in the next round.

---



How To Apply

Message us through OnlineJobs.ph with:

Name and location

Internet speed test screenshot (from speedtest.net - must show 25+ Mbps)

ID Proof score (60+ required) and NBI clearance status





Confirmation that you can work 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift consistently

No voice recording = we cannot review you. We hire on voice, not paper, for phone sales roles.

---



Start Over Movement. Building real communities. Paying real money. Looking for Three STRONG cold calllers NOW for Mississippi



We look forward to meeting you Monday

mber who can handle graphic and web design.This is a remote, long-term role for someone who is proactive, meets deadlines, and communicates clearly.

mbers to check

title: AI Email Designer Needed
description:
Hello there!



We are a growing
 Marketing Agency with 60+ active e-commerce clients looking for an enthusiastic and skilled
 Designer.



This is a part-time role where you will be working alongside our current team of 50+.



PLEASE ONLY APPLY IF YOU ARE A STRONG
 DESIGNER WHO BUILDS FINAL DESIGNS IN FIGMA AND USES AI 



We are looking for a top-tier
 designer first and foremost. Your main job is to design beautiful, high-converting
s inside Figma for our DTC clients across health, beauty, supplements, pet care, apparel, jewelry, and faith-based brands.



We need someone who consistently hits deadlines and produces polished, on-brand, scroll-stopping
 designs every single time.



These designs will be made for individual
 sends across our client roster. Our
 designs are typically short to medium in length and will always be based on each client's website branding. All text copy will be provided for the design.



The final output for every
 design must be built and exported from Figma at 1000px width with grouped, editable blocks. Figma is your home base.



As a secondary part of the role, you should know how to use AI image generation tools like Nano Banana Pro, Midjourney, Flux, or similar to create supporting visuals when a client does not have a strong asset library to pull from.



This includes things like hero images, lifestyle shots, background scenes, and supporting product visuals.



You will use these tools to prompt and generate the imagery, then bring everything back into Figma to assemble the final
 design. AI image generation is a supporting skill, not the main job.



Here are examples of the level (and beyond) we expect you to design at:




/drive/folders/1xSeK67_uBRNsUTy8u_IZSb-fbHDZHvZU?usp=drive_link



Your designs should match this quality at minimum and ideally exceed it in layout creativity, hierarchy, typography, and visual storytelling.



 



Requirements:



- Minimum 2-year
 design experience



- Highly proficient in Figma (this is the most important requirement)



- Strong understanding of brand identity, color theory, typography, and direct-response design



- Able to take a brand's website and translate its look and feel into a polished
 design



- Working knowledge of AI image generation tools (Nano Banana Pro preferred, or Midjourney, Flux, Sora, etc.) for creating supporting imagery when client assets are limited



- Proficient in English



- Proficient with Slack for team communication



- Able to work weekdays and weekends



 



Bonus Points:



- Experience designing
s inside Klaviyo, 
, or Iterable



- Strong eye for direct-response design (CTA hierarchy, scannability, visual flow)



- Experience working with brands that have minimal asset libraries



- Familiarity with Claude (claude.ai) for design ideation, SVG generation, or layout variations



 



Your tasks as an
 Designer will include:



1. Build polished, on-brand
 designs in Figma using the text copy and brand references we provide



2. Match each brand's identity perfectly, from typography to color palette to overall mood



3. Use AI image generation tools (Nano Banana Pro, etc.) to create supporting visuals such as hero images, lifestyle shots, and background scenes when client assets are limited, then bring those visuals into Figma to finalize the design



4. Design up to 5
s per day (the majority will typically be for one or two clients so the workflow stays efficient)



5. Export all final designs from Figma at 1000px width with grouped, editable blocks



6. Communicate progress and revisions with the team in Slack



7. Complete all tasks daily before 3 PM PH time



 



We ask that you answer the questions below to help us get to know you.



Questions:



1. Have you designed for
 marketing before? If yes, for how long?



2. Do you have examples of
 designs you have built in Figma we can review? Please link
 designs only (no other design work).



3. How would you approach designing an
 for a brand whose entire visual identity you are seeing for the first time? Walk us through your process from website to finished Figma file.



4. Have you used AI image generation tools (Nano Banana Pro, Midjourney, Flux, Sora, etc.) to create supporting imagery for a design? If yes, please share 1 to 2 examples of AI visuals you generated and how you incorporated them into a final design.



5. How do you keep AI-generated imagery from looking generic or "AI-ish" so it blends naturally with a real brand identity?



6. How long would it take you to build a fully designed
 in Figma if all the copy and brand references are provided?



7. Can you work mornings (8 AM to 12 PM PH time)?



8. Can you commit to at least 6 months if selected?



9. Can you work at least 2 hours on weekends?



10. Have you worked for an
 Marketing agency or e-commerce team before?



11. How do you keep your designs feeling fresh across multiple campaigns for the same brand without falling into repetitive layouts?



 



We are looking to grow very quickly over the next few months and this position will allow for opportunities to move into incentive-based pay and a salary increase. After 3 months, there will be a salary increase.



We ask that if you do provide examples, they be relevant to what the job describes.



Biweekly Pay: $150 CAD



Hours: 4 Hours Per day, some days it will be less than 4 graphics to make :)



Currently, you must be able to work at least 20hrs/week (including weekends)



 



*** HOW TO APPLY ***



*You must include your favorite color + ai tool in the subject line of your application for it to be considered (this shows you actually read it and is very important; if you do not have it in there, your application will be skipped).



1.) Send us a message answering all 11 questions



2.) Include examples of your Figma
 design work



3.) Include 1 to 2 examples of AI-generated imagery you have used inside a real design (if applicable)



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Executive Assistant / Operations & Lead Generation Assistant
description:
We run a high-end content agency working with hospitality and real estate brands. We are growing quickly and are looking for a reliable, highly organised assistant to help manage day-to-day operations and support lead generation.



This role is focused on keeping the business running smoothly behind the scenes while also helping generate new opportunities through outreach.



You will not be expected to “figure things out” alone. We will provide systems, scripts, and clear direction. Your role is to execute at a high level, stay organised, and keep everything moving.



Responsibilities:



Operations and Admin (Primary)



* Manage inbox (organise, respond, keep clean)

* Handle calendar, bookings, and scheduling (client shoots, meetings)

* Coordinate client communication and follow-ups

* Organise files, content, and internal workflows

* Maintain and update our internal CRM system

* Ensure everything is structured, organised, and running smoothly



Lead Generation and Outreach (Secondary)



* Send cold outreach messages daily using scripts provided

* Research and identify potential leads

* Track conversations and follow-ups in CRM

* Book calls and manage lead pipeline



Requirements:



* Strong English communication (written is very important)

* Highly organised and detail-oriented

* Experience with inbox and calendar management

* Able to follow systems and processes consistently

* Reliable, proactive, and responsive

* Comfortable working with CRM tools and tracking data

* Comfortable using AI tools such as ChatGPT to assist with tasks



Bonus (not required but valuable):



* Comfortable using Canva templates to create simple social media content (carousels, posts, stories)

* Experience with lead generation or outreach

* Experience supporting founders or small teams

* Familiarity with tools like Slack, Notion, ClickUp, or similar

* Experience with automation tools such as Zapier, Make, or n8n



Hours:



* 6 hours per day

* Long-term role



Application Instructions:



To apply, please include:



1. A short explanation of your experience with calendar and inbox management

2. How you would organise a busy week with multiple client bookings

3. Your experience with lead generation or outreach (if any)

4. Write 2 example outreach messages to a restaurant offering content services

5. Briefly explain how you have used ChatGPT or AI tools in your work



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Long-Term Opportunity:



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber to grow with the business. For the right candidate, this role can expand over time with increased responsibility.



We also offer performance-based bonuses. If your outreach efforts contribute to new clients that we successfully close on a retainer, you will receive additional bonuses.



Work Style:



We are looking for someone who is friendly, positive, and professional in communication, confident speaking with clients and leads, reliable, organised, and consistent in their work, and able to follow systems while maintaining a personable and human approach.

title: Adobe Video Editor
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a highly skilled and creative Video Editor to join our team, The Visible Method. If you live and breathe video editing and have a keen eye for what makes content go viral on social media, we want you! You will be responsible for editing high-quality, engaging videos specifically tailored for Instagram Reels and YouTube.



We need someone who specializes exclusively in Adobe Premiere Pro (and After Effects) or Final Cut Pro. We are looking for that specific, high-end editing style right now!



Key Responsibilities



•Edit long-form YouTube videos that retain viewer attention, utilizing excellent pacing, storytelling, B-roll, sound design, and color grading.

•Repurpose long-form content or edit raw footage into highly engaging, fast-paced Instagram Reels (incorporating trendy transitions, captions, and effects).

•Collaborate closely with our team to understand the vision and goals for each piece of content.

•Ensure all videos are optimized for their respective platforms (aspect ratios, safe zones, export settings).

•Manage multiple projects and deliver final videos within agreed deadlines.



Requirements



•Software Expertise: Must be highly proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro (After Effects is a huge plus) OR Final Cut Pro.

•Portfolio: A strong portfolio showcasing your previous work on YouTube and Instagram Reels. (Applications without a portfolio will not be considered).

•Style: Ability to edit in modern, high-retention styles (e.g., dynamic captions, zoom-ins, sound effects, motion graphics).

•Attention to Detail: Excellent sense of pacing, audio mixing, color correction, grammar! We want to have less back and forth as possible 

•Reliability: Strong communication skills, reliable internet connection, and the ability to meet deadlines consistently.

•Experience: Proven experience editing for content creators, brands, or digital marketing agencies.



Why Join Us?



•Consistent and ongoing work.

•Opportunity to work on exciting content that reaches a wide audience.

•Flexible working hours (as long as deadlines are met).

•A lot of Room for growth as our channels expand & we bring on clients! 



How to Apply



To apply, please reply with the following:

1.A brief introduction about yourself and your experience.

2.Specify which software you specialize in (Adobe or Final Cut Pro).

3.Links to your portfolio or specific examples of YouTube videos and Instagram Reels you have edited.

4.Your expected hourly or monthly rate.

5.Start your application with the word "CREATIVE" so we know you read the entire job description.



We are ready to hire immediately for the right candidate. We look forward to seeing your work!
