title: Sales
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and results-driven Sales Closer to join our fast-growing credit repair and business funding company.



Your role is simple: take qualified leads and convert them into paying clients. All leads are warm and pre-qualified by our appointment setters — your focus is closing deals, building trust, and driving revenue.



This is a performance-based role for individuals who are confident, persuasive, and hungry to earn based on results.



Responsibilities:



* Conduct scheduled sales calls with qualified prospects

* Analyze client credit situations and present tailored solutions

* Clearly explain our services (credit repair, funding, tradelines, etc.)

* Overcome objections and confidently guide prospects to a decision

* Close deals and collect payments

* Update CRM with accurate notes and client status

* Follow up with und
 prospects to convert them into clients



Requirements:



* Proven experience in sales/closing (high-ticket sales preferred)

* Strong English communication and persuasion skills

* Ability to build trust quickly and control conversations

* Experience with CRM systems (GoHighLevel is a plus)

* Comfortable discussing financial situations with clients

* Self-driven, competitive, and disciplined



Compensation:



* Base pay + commission per closed deal

* High earning potential based on performance

* Bonuses for hitting weekly/monthly targets



This role is NOT for you if:



* You are afraid to ask for the sale

* You struggle with handling objections

* You need constant supervision



This role IS for you if:



* You are confident closing deals over the phone

* You are motivated by performance-based income

* You want to grow into a high-level sales position



To be considered, include the word ‘ICONIC’ in your application and briefly explain your closing experience and your average close rate.

title: Video Game QA Tester / Game Designer (Roguelike) – Part-Time
description:
I’m looking for a detail-oriented QA tester / game designer to help test and refine a roguelike indie game currently in active development.



You’ll play early builds, break systems, find edge cases, and give structured feedback that improves stability, clarity, and overall game feel.



What You’ll Be Testing



Core gameplay systems and combat mechanics

Abilities, status effects, and progression systems

Enemy behavior and encounter balance

UI clarity, feedback, and player flow

Bugs, exploits, softlocks, and unintended interactions

You won’t just report bugs. You’ll help improve pacing, clarity, and the overall player experience.



What I’m Looking For

Experience testing games, mods, or interactive systems

Strong attention to detail and structured feedback skills

Ability to clearly document reproduction steps

Comfort working with early builds and evolving systems

Good intuition for balance, difficulty, and fairness

Bonus if you enjoy roguelikes, systems-heavy games, or challenging combat design.



Project-based with potential for ongoing work (2-4 hours per day)

To Apply, Please Include

A short summary of your QA, testing or game design experience

Examples of games you’ve tested or provided feedback on (you must have experience testing, playing, or designing roguelike games)

Your availability

Your hourly rate in USD

title: Automation Developer (n8n / Zapier + AI Integration) for Airbnb and Cleaning Business
description:
I am looking for someone who can build automation systems and connect tools for a growing short-term rental and cleaning company. This is not a basic VA role. You will be building real workflows that reduce manual work and improve efficiency.



Your role will involve creating automations using n8n or Zapier, connecting tools like ToDoist, Google Sheets, RingCentral, and messaging platforms, and using AI (OpenAI/ChatGPT) to generate follow-ups, summaries, and structured tasks. You will help build systems for lead tracking, follow-ups, cleaning coordination, and daily business reporting.



You must have experience with n8n or Zapier and understand how triggers, actions, delays, and conditions work. You should be comfortable connecting different tools using APIs or webhooks and have some experience using AI in workflows. If you only have experience prompting ChatGPT but have not built real automations, this role is not a good fit.



To apply, please answer the following in your application. First, explain how you would automate a missed call into a logged lead, a follow-up message, and a task in a system. Second, share an example of a workflow you have built and explain how it works. Third, list the tools you have used for automation.



This is a part-time role to start, around 10 to 15 hours per week, with pay between 6 to 10 dollars per hour depending on experience. There is strong potential to grow into a long-term role if you can execute well.



I am looking for someone who can build and implement, not just suggest ideas. If you are strong in systems, automation, and practical AI use, this is a great opportunity.

title: Server Infrastructure Expert
description:
AWS & GCP | Cloud Architecture | CI/CD | AWS CDK



We’re looking for a highly experienced Server Infrastructure Expert to design, build, and optimise secure, scalable cloud environments across AWS and Google Cloud Platform (GCP), with strong hands-on experience using AWS CDK for infrastructure as code.



This role is ideal for someone who thrives on solving complex infrastructure challenges, automating deployments, and building robust CI/CD pipelines that support modern, high-availability applications.



What You’ll Do



Design and implement cloud architectures across AWS and GCP



Build and manage infrastructure using AWS CDK, Terraform, and other IaC tools



Design, build, and optimise CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Bitbucket, Jenkins, etc.)



Automate deployments and infrastructure provisioning



Implement security, monitoring, logging, and cost-optimisation best practices



Support containerised and microservices environments (Docker)



Collaborate with development teams to improve deployment speed, reliability, and scalability



Troubleshoot, optimise, and harden production environments



What We’re Looking For



Strong hands-on experience with AWS and GCP architecture



Proven experience using AWS CDK in production environments



Deep understanding of CI/CD principles and tooling



Experience with Terraform or similar infrastructure-as-code tools



Solid Linux, networking, and cloud security knowledge



Experience with container orchestration (Kubernetes preferred)



Strong problem-solving, documentation, and communication skills



Ability to work independently and advise on best-practice architecture



Nice to Have



AWS and/or GCP certifications



Multi-cloud or hybrid-cloud experience



DevSecOps, security, or compliance experience



Experience with serverless architectures (Lambda, Cloud Functions)



What We Offer



Challenging, end-to-end cloud and infrastructure work



Flexible working arrangements



Competitive remuneration based on experience



Opportunity to influence cloud and DevOps strategy

title: Construction Project Coordinator
description:

Who We Are – Team RRE

We are team players that prioritize open communication while exercising emotional control, that do the right thing while being dedicated to winning, we are not perfect we learn from our mistakes in the process of being great



Core Values:

-We are Team players

-We prioritize Open Communication

-We exercise emotional control

-We do the right thing

-We are dedicated to winning

We’re building a long-term team (10+ years). We’re looking for self-driven individuals with high standards and high goals.

If you’re not aligned with that level of accountability, ownership, and effort—THIS ROLE WON'T BE A FIT!!!



Position Overview

The Project Coordinator is a key support role responsible for keeping projects organized, documented, and moving forward.

You’ll act as the communication hub between Project Managers, field teams, vendors, and GCs—ensuring everything is tracked, updated, and executed properly.



Key Responsibilities

-Project Setup

-Create and organize job folders in Google Drive

-Prepare startup documentation (COI, licenses, intro letters, etc.)

-Set up vendor accounts and assist with job costing

-Load projects into systems (Contractor Foreman, accounting tools)

-Tracking & Documentation

-Track schedules, daily reports, and job progress

-Organize site photos by phase and date

-Manage and route project communication

-Maintain weekly job status updates

-Weekly Job Team Talks (WJTT)

-Prepare and distribute weekly reports for all active jobs



Track:

-Progress & schedule

-Labor & production

-Materials & deliveries

-Risks & next steps

-Field & Operations Support

-Coordinate materials, equipment, and deliveries

-Track rentals, tools, and usage

-Assist with purchasing and vendor coordination

-Support field team logistics (lodging, per diem, mileage)

-Change Orders & Billing

-Prepare and track change orders (T&M, scope changes, etc.)

-Assist with Schedule of Values and progress billing

-Support invoicing, collections, and retainage tracking



Systems Management

-Maintain Contractor Foreman (daily logs, job updates, closeout)

-Ensure field team access and usage compliance



What We’re Looking For

-Highly organized and detail-oriented

-Strong communicator (clear, direct, responsive)

-Self-driven with high accountability

-Able to manage multiple projects at once

-Calm under pressure with strong emotional control

-Team-first, solution-oriented mindset



Requirements

-Construction experience preferred (electrical a plus)

-Proficient in Google Workspace

-Experience with project management tools (e.g., Contractor Foreman, Procore) is a plus



What’s In It for You

-Strong, winning team culture

-Long-term growth opportunity

-Health, dental, and vision coverage

-Retirement plan

-Paid holidays

-Opportunity to grow into leadership roles as the company scales



Why RRE Inc.?

We’re not just hiring for a role—we’re building a team focused on growth, accountability, and long-term success.



How to Apply

Send your resume

Subject Line: Project Coordinator Application – Team Player – [Your Name]

title: Online English Tutor for Kids (K–2) | Fun, Conversational, Part-Time | $5+/hr + Bonuses
description:
Title: Online English Tutor for Kids (K–2) | Fun, Conversational, Part-Time | $5+/hr + Bonuses



Job Overview

We are a fast-growing English learning company helping young students (K–2) build confidence in speaking English.

We are looking for energetic, patient, and friendly English tutors who enjoy working with children and can create a fun learning environment.

This is a long-term opportunity with consistent students and growth potential.



What You’ll Do

Teach 1:1 or small group online English sessions (25–30 minutes)

Focus on speaking and confidence, not grammar-heavy lessons

Follow simple lesson structures (we provide materials)

Encourage students to speak, repeat, and express themselves

Provide basic feedback after sessions

Build positive relationships with students



Who We’re Looking For

We want tutors who are:

Friendly, energetic, and patient

Comfortable teaching young learners (ages 5–8)

Clear and easy to understand when speaking English

Reliable and punctual

Positive and encouraging



Requirements

Good spoken English (clear accent, easy for kids to understand)

Stable internet connection

Quiet teaching environment

Webcam and headset

Available for consistent schedule



Preferred (Not Required)

Teaching experience (ESL or kids)

Experience with Total Physical Response (TPR)

Experience using props, gestures, or visuals



Work Schedule

Part-time (10–30 hours/week)

Must be available during:

Korea peak hours (evenings KST)

Flexible scheduling based on student demand



Compensation

$4–$6 USD/hour starting

Performance bonuses based on:

Student retention

Parent feedback

Session quality



Why Join Us

Consistent students (no hunting for bookings)

Simple lesson structure (no heavy prep)

Supportive team

Opportunity to grow with the company



How to Apply (IMPORTANT)

To apply, please:

Record a 1–2 minute demo video teaching a young student (pretend if needed)

Introduce yourself (name, experience, personality)

Show how you would teach simple phrases like:

“Hello, my name is…”

“How are you?”

Include the word “CHATZO” in your application

Applications without a video will not be considered.

title: Remote Dispatcher (Transportation – Multi-Fleet)
description:

Stride Hauling & K & S Transports is seeking a reliable and experienced Remote Dispatcher to manage daily operations for a growing transportation fleet, including tow trucks, dump trucks, and semi-trucks. This role is critical to ensuring efficient routing, timely service, and strong communication between drivers and clients.

EXPERIENCE

title: US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper
description:
Job Title: US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper

Location: Remote

Job Type: Part-time

Starting Rate: $6.00/hour (Increase after 90-day performance review)



We are seeking a reliable, detail-oriented professional to join our growing team. If you have real experience with US tax preparation and QuickBooks bookkeeping and enjoy working in an organized, systems-driven environment, we encourage you to apply.



Overview

We are looking for a dedicated US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper to support our accounting and tax operations. In this role, you will prepare individual and business tax returns, maintain accurate financial records, and help ensure clients’ books are clean and tax-ready year-round.

This position is ideal for someone who is accurate, dependable, and proactive, with the ability to work independently and meet deadlines.



Job Details

As a US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper, you will manage tax preparation and bookkeeping tasks for multiple clients, maintain organized documentation, and support efficient workflows. Your work will play a key role in ensuring compliance, accuracy, and a smooth tax process for our clients.



What You’ll Be Doing

Tax Preparation & Compliance

Prepare Individual Tax Returns (Form 1040) and related schedules

Prepare Business Tax Returns (1120, 1120S, 1065)

Handle State and Franchise Tax filings

Review financial records to ensure accuracy and tax readiness

Identify missing information and communicate with the team as needed

Maintain organized digital tax workpapers and documentation



Bookkeeping & Financial Management

Perform bookkeeping using QuickBooks Online

Categorize transactions accurately

Reconcile bank and credit card accounts

Clean up and correct incomplete or messy books when necessary

Prepare monthly financial reports (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet)

Ensure books remain accurate and ready for tax filing



Data Entry & Administrative Support

Perform accurate data entry and document management

Upload and organize client files using consistent naming and folder structures

Track tasks and meet internal deadlines

Assist with administrative support related to tax and accounting operations



Systems & Process Improvement

Follow and help improve internal workflows and checklists

Create SOPs and process documentation when needed

Identify opportunities to improve efficiency or reduce errors



What You Bring to the Role

Proven experience preparing US individual and business tax returns

Experience with QuickBooks Online

Experience with TaxSlayer or similar US tax software

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Excellent time management and organizational skills

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Preferred Qualifications

Experience handling Franchise Taxes

Previous experience working with a US accounting or tax firm



What You Can Expect

Starting rate of $6.00/hour

Performance review after 90 days with opportunity for a pay increase

Long-term position with growth potential

Stable workload and supportive team environment

Opportunity to expand responsibilities based on performance



About the Company

We are a growing accounting and tax services company focused on providing accurate, reliable, and efficient support to our clients. Our goal is to build a strong remote team that values integrity, accountability, and continuous improvement. We believe in long-term relationships and creating opportunities for team members to grow with the company.

If you have real US tax preparation experience and are looking for a long-term remote opportunity, we encourage you to apply.

title: Real Estate Acquisitions VA — Cold Caller
description:
Butler Acquisition Group is a US real estate investment company growing fast. We're hiring an Acquisitions VA to call off-market property owners, qualify motivated sellers, and book appointments for our acquisition manager.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

- 200+ outbound dials per day from pre-loaded lists

- Hit a minimum of 200 dials and 15 conversations per day, tracked in GoHighLevel

- Use our scripts to identify motivated sellers and gather property/condition info

- Log every call accurately in GoHighLevel

- Tag leads, set follow-ups, send approved SMS templates

- Hand hot leads directly to the acquisition manager

- Show up on time every day, US Central hours



TOOLS WE PROVIDE

- GoHighLevel account (CRM + dialer + SMS)

- Pre-loaded lead lists

- Scripts and SMS templates

- Training on our pipeline and process



REQUIRED

- Cold calling experience

- Real estate experience

- Excellent spoken English — clear, calm, confident under pushback

- Comfortable learning a new CRM/dialer if you haven't used GoHighLevel before

- Reliable internet (15+ Mbps), quiet workspace, USB headset

- Available 9am–5pm US Central time



NICE TO HAVE

- Prior GoHighLevel experience

- PropStream + BatchSkipTracing experience

- Familiarity with wholesale, lease option, and buy/rehab/hold exit strategies



PAY

- $4/hour base (~$640/month at 40 hrs/week)

- $150 bonus per closed deal you sourced

- Paid weekly via Wise or PayPal

- 13th month bonus + PTO after 90 days



HOW TO APPLY (read carefully — applications missing any of these get skipped)



1. Send a 60-second Vocaroo recording introducing yourself and reading this script:

"Hi, this is [your name] calling from Butler Acquisition Group. I'm reaching out because we'd like to make an offer on a property you might own. Do you have 30 seconds to talk?"



2. Briefly describe your cold calling and real estate experience.



3. List the dialers and CRMs you've used.



4. Attach a screenshot of your speedtest.net result.



5. Start your application with the word "GULF" so I know you read this.



Hiring this week. Serious applicants only.

title: General Virtual Assistant (GVA) – Remote
description:
About the Role:

We are looking for a reliable, proactive, and detail-oriented General Virtual Assistant to support our team with day-to-day administrative and operational tasks. This role is ideal for someone who is organized, tech-savvy, and able to work independently while keeping communication clear and professional.



You will play a key role in keeping operations smooth by handling a mix of admin, coordination, and support tasks.



Key Responsibilities:

* Manage
s and calendars

* Perform data entry and database updates

* Create and maintain spreadsheets

* Conduct online research

* Assist with CRM updates and task tracking

* Support project coordination and follow-ups

* Organize files and documents

* Handle basic customer support when needed

* Complete ad hoc administrative tasks



Qualifications:

* Strong English communication skills (written & spoken)

* At least 1 year experience as a Virtual Assistant or in an admin role

* Highly organized and detail-oriented

* Able to follow instructions and meet deadlines

* Comfortable working remotely and independently

* Proactive and resourceful

* Able to work during US business hours (preferred)

* Neutral or American accent is a plus



Tech & System Requirements:

* Windows 10 or newer (or Mac equivalent)

* Minimum 8GB RAM

* Reliable high-speed internet

* Noise-canceling headset

* Webcam

* Quiet workspace

* Backup power/internet is a plus



Tools You May Use:

* Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Calendar)

* Microsoft Office

* CRM systems (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Salesforce, etc.)

* Project management tools (ClickUp, Asana, Trello)

* Slack or other communication tools



How to Apply?

Reply to this job post with the following:

* UPDATED Resume

* UPDATED professional intro video (1–2 mins)

* Please include in your video:

* Brief introduction about yourself

* Your VA/GVA experience

* Tools and systems you’ve used

* One fun fact about yourself



We’re looking for someone dependable, organized, and ready to grow with a long-term team.

title: Email Marketing Specialist — GoHighLevel (Champion Gym)
description:
About Us

Champion Gym is a martial arts and fitness facility in Grande Prairie, Alberta. We offer programs in BJJ (Jiu-Jitsu), Muay Thai, MMA, Boxing, Taekwondo, Kickboxing, Wrestling, Ninja Warrior, Yoga, and Fitness. We also run Birthday Parties, Events, and TCLA — a private school program. We're growing fast and need someone to build out our
 marketing system from the ground up.



The Role

We use GoHighLevel and have a contact list of approximately 9,000 people. Our member data lives in Gymdesk — including program enrollment, attendance, membership tier, payment status, and purchase history — all exportable to CSV and ready for import into GHL. We need someone to build the
 and SMS marketing infrastructure and turn this data into targeted, revenue-generating campaigns.



What You'll Do

- Import and structure member data from Gymdesk CSV into GHL

- Segment contacts by program, membership tier, activity level, and demographics

- Build lead nurture sequences for new inquiries

- Create re-engagement campaigns for cold and lapsed contacts

- Set up retention flows triggered by attendance drops and expiring memberships

- Write regular promotional
s (offers, events, class spotlights)

- Build SMS follow-up sequences tied to
 campaigns

- Track and report on open rates, clicks, and conversions weekly



Requirements

- Proven hands-on experience with GoHighLevel — specifically
/SMS automation and workflows

- Experience with CSV data imports and contact segmentation in GHL

- Strong English copywriting

- Comfortable building from scratch — not just managing existing campaigns

- Self-directed with minimal hand-holding needed

- Bonus: experience with gyms, fitness, or local service businesses; basic Canva skills for
 graphics and promotional assets



To Apply

Share 1–2 examples of GHL automations or
 campaigns you've built. Tell us in a few sentences what your first 30 days would look like setting up
 marketing for a gym with a 9,000-person segmented list.

title: Construction Lead Generation & Business Development Specialist (US Market – Remote)
description:
Construction Lead Generation & Business Development Specialist (US Market – Remote)



We are a Florida-based construction company specializing in high-end residential and luxury home builds. We are building a lean, high-performing team and looking for someone who can generate, manage, and convert real project opportunities.



This is a results-driven role combining lead generation, sales, and client relationship management.



Role Overview

You will be responsible for sourcing new opportunities, managing inbound leads, and building relationships with decision-makers such as homeowners, developers, and partners.



Your goal is to turn opportunities into qualified meetings and secured projects.



Key Responsibilities

Manage and convert incoming leads (homeowners, developers, architects, partners)

Independently find and source new construction opportunities

Conduct outreach via
, calls, LinkedIn, and other channels

Qualify leads based on budget, scope, timeline, and fit

Build relationships with key decision-makers

Present the company and its services professionally

Schedule and coordinate meetings with the CEO

Maintain CRM and track all leads, follow-ups, and pipeline progress

Conduct market research to identify new business opportunities

Work closely with the internal team to ensure smooth handoff of projects



Requirements

At least 1 year experience in lead generation, appointment setting, or B2B sales (international clients)

Background in construction, real estate, or related industry (strong advantage)

Strong communication and relationship-building skills

Fluent in English (additional language is a plus)

Experience using outreach tools, and online platforms

Comfortable with Google Workspace, spreadsheets, scheduling tools, and Dropbox.

Proactive, organized, and results-driven mindset

Able to work US hours (EDT)



We are not looking for someone who just sends messages.

We need someone who can identify real opportunities, build relationships, and convert them into qualified projects.



Compensation & Growth

Base pay + performance-based incentives

Opportunity for commission on secured projects

Long-term growth as part of a core team in a growing construction company



How to Apply (STRICT)



Apply with a subject: Lead Generation - (Your Name)



Include ALL of the following:



Your CV and Portfolio (if any)

Your experience in lead generation / sales (construction or real estate if any)

Where exactly would you find potential clients for a luxury construction company?

A short sample message introducing our company to a potential client



Applications without complete answers will not be reviewed.

title: Dispute Manager
description:
We are currently looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Dispute Manager VA who can help us deliver accurate, compliant, and effective dispute processing while maintaining an excellent client experience.



If you are organized, responsive, and take pride in precision and results — this role is for you.



About the Company

We are a growing service-based company focused on helping individuals improve their credit profiles and overall financial readiness. Our goal is to create a structured, compliant, and supportive environment for both our clients and our team.



We value accuracy, communication, accountability, and consistency.



Responsibilities

As a Dispute Manager VA, you will:



Review client credit reports for inaccuracies and negative items

Prepare and submit dispute letters (credit bureaus, creditors, CFPB, etc.)

Track dispute progress and update client files in our system (DisputeFox or similar)

Assist with onboarding clients and reviewing submitted documents

Monitor deadlines and ensure timely follow-ups

Communicate updates to clients when needed

Maintain organized and accurate client records

Report any discrepancies, issues, or concerns to the team

Requirements



We are looking for someone who:

Has strong written English communication

Is highly detail-oriented and organized

Can follow dispute workflows and compliance guidelines

Is reliable and responsive

Has basic knowledge of credit repair/disputes (preferred but not required)

Is willing to learn and grow with the team



To Apply, Please Complete the Following:

1. Please answer the following questions:



A. What credit repair software or platforms do you have experience with?

(Examples: DisputeFox, Client Dispute Manager, Credit Repair Cloud, etc.)



B. Briefly explain your dispute process from start to finish.

(Keep it simple but include key steps you take to ensure accuracy and results.)



C. Are you familiar with filing disputes through:

Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB)

Federal Trade Commission (FTC)



If yes, briefly explain when and why you would use them.



D. How do you ensure strong and effective dispute results for clients?

(Example: documentation, strategy, follow-ups, compliance, etc.)



To Be Considered, Please:

Complete the test task above

Include the word “GROWTH” in your application



Applications that do not follow these steps will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Video Editor (AI Tools Fluent)
description:
NOTE! Please review the entire post and ensure all application instructions are followed. Applications that do not follow these steps may not be considered.



About MadeEA.ai

MadeEA is a UK based AI consultancy. Our content engine produces short form and long form video for our AI agents, our coaches, our clients, and our founder's personal brand. We need a video editor who moves fast, tells stories with the edit, and uses AI tools to multiply output.



The Role

You will edit short form and long form video for MadeEA, the founder's personal brand, and MadeEA clients. You own the edit from raw footage to publish ready file. You ship multiple cuts a day, not one a week. This is a full time, long term seat.



What You Will Do

-Edit short form vertical video for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and LinkedIn.

-Edit long form podcasts, VSLs, and case study videos.

-Use AI video tools (HeyGen, Runway, ElevenLabs, Descript, Captions, and similar) to scale output.

-Build and reuse template projects in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut Pro.

-Cut for retention. Hook in the first three seconds. No dead frames.

-Coordinate with the social media lead on what gets cut, when, and for which platform.



You Are A Fit If

-You have at least three years of paid video editing experience.

-You have a portfolio of short form work that performed (views, retention, or attributed sales).

-You are fluent in at least one AI video tool (HeyGen, Runway, or Descript) and willing to learn more.

-You can tell a story with a cut. Syncing clips to music is not enough.

-You hand off finished video without revisions on the basics (audio levels, captions, color, framing).

-You work UK or Manila hours.



Bonus Points

-You have edited for a coach, course creator, or AI brand.

-You have used hyperframes or AI generated b roll in a paid project.

-You can write or rewrite hook copy for a video, not just place it.



What We Are NOT Looking For

X Editors who need a creative brief to do anything.

X Editors who need to be taught how to use AI tools.

X Wedding, event, or corporate explainer specialists. We need short form social and VSL.



How To Apply

IMPORTANT: Please click the link below to submit your application:

title: Social Media Manager/ STRONG UNDERSTANDING OF VIDEO CONTENT
